44DWORD Level::tlsIdx = TlsAlloc();
45DWORD Level::tlsIdxLightCache = TlsAlloc();
46
47// 4J : WESTY : Added for time played stats.
48#include "net.minecraft.stats.h"
49
50// 4J - Caching of lighting data added. This is implemented as a 16x16x16 cache of ints (ie 16K storage in total). The index of the element to be used in the array is determined by the lower
51// four bits of each x/y/z position, and the upper 7/4/7 bits of the x/y/z positions are stored within the element itself along with the cached values etc. The cache can be enabled per thread by
52// calling enableLightingCache, otherwise standard non-cached accesses are performed. General method for using caching if enabled on a thread is:
53// (1) Call initCache, this invalidates any previous data in the cache
54// (2) Use setBrightnessCached, getBrightnessCached, getEmissionCached, getBlockingCached methods to get and set data
55// (3) Call flushCache, which writes through any dirty values in cache
56
57#ifdef _LARGE_WORLDS
58// Packing for cache entries in large worlds is as follows ( 64 bits per entry)
59// Add the extra x and z data into the top 32 bits, to keep all the masks and code for everything else the same
60// xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzWEBLllllbbbbeeeexxxxxxyyyyzzzzzz
61//
62// xxxxxx - middle 6 bits of x position
63// yyyy - top 4 bits of y position
64// zzzzzz - middle 6 bits of z position
65// eeee - light emission
66// bbbb - light blocking
67// llll - light level
68// L - light value valid
69// B - blocking value valid
70// E - emission value valid
71// W - lighting value requires write
72// xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx - top 16 bits of x position
73// zzzzzzzzzzzzzzzz - top 16 bits of z position
74#else
75// Packing for cache entries is as follows ( 32 bits per entry)
76// WEBLllllbbbbeeeexxxxxxyyyyzzzzzz
77//
78// xxxxxx - top 6 bits of x position
79// yyyy - top 4 bits of y position
80// zzzzzz - top 6 bits of z position
81// eeee - light emission
82// bbbb - light blocking
83// llll - light level
84// L - light value valid
85// B - blocking value valid
86// E - emission value valid
87// W - lighting value requires write
88#endif
89
90
91void Level::enableLightingCache()
92{
93 // Allocate 16K (needs 32K for large worlds) for a 16x16x16x4 byte cache of results, plus 128K required for toCheck array. Rounding up to 256 to keep as multiple of alignement - aligning to 128K boundary for possible cache locking.
94 void *cache = static_cast<unsigned char *>(XPhysicalAlloc(256 * 1024, MAXULONG_PTR, 128 * 1024, PAGE_READWRITE | MEM_LARGE_PAGES));
95 TlsSetValue(tlsIdxLightCache,cache);
96}
97
98void Level::destroyLightingCache()
99{
100 lightCache_t *cache = static_cast<lightCache_t *>(TlsGetValue(tlsIdxLightCache));
101 XPhysicalFree(cache);
102}
103
104inline int GetIndex(int x, int y, int z)
105{
106 return ( ( x & 15 ) << 8 ) | ( ( y & 15 ) << 4 ) | ( z & 15 );
107}
108
109void Level::initCachePartial(lightCache_t *cache, int xc, int yc, int zc)
110{
111 cachewritten = false;
112 if( cache == nullptr ) return;
113
114 int idx;
115 if( !(yc & 0xffffff00) )
116 {
117 idx = GetIndex(xc, yc, zc);
118 cache[idx] = 0;
119 idx = GetIndex(xc - 1, yc, zc);
120 cache[idx] = 0;
121 idx = GetIndex(xc + 1, yc, zc);
122 cache[idx] = 0;
123 idx = GetIndex(xc, yc, zc - 1);
124 cache[idx] = 0;
125 idx = GetIndex(xc, yc, zc + 1);
126 cache[idx] = 0;
127 }
128 if( !((yc-1) & 0xffffff00) )
129 {
130 idx = GetIndex(xc, yc - 1, zc);
131 cache[idx] = 0;
132 }
133 if( !((yc+1) & 0xffffff00) )
134 {
135 idx = GetIndex(xc, yc + 1, zc);
136 cache[idx] = 0;
137 }
138}
139
140void Level::initCacheComplete(lightCache_t *cache, int xc, int yc, int zc)
141{
142 lightCache_t old[7];
143 if( !(yc & 0xffffff00) )
144 {
145 old[0] = cache[GetIndex(xc, yc, zc)];
146 old[1] = cache[GetIndex(xc - 1, yc, zc)];
147 old[2] = cache[GetIndex(xc + 1, yc, zc)];
148 old[5] = cache[GetIndex(xc, yc, zc - 1)];
149 old[6] = cache[GetIndex(xc, yc, zc + 1)];
150 }
151 if( !((yc-1) & 0xffffff00) )
152 {
153 old[3] = cache[GetIndex(xc, yc - 1, zc)];
154 }
155 if( !((yc+1) & 0xffffff00) )
156 {
157 old[4] = cache[GetIndex(xc, yc + 1, zc)];
158 }
159
160 XMemSet128(cache,0,16*16*16*sizeof(lightCache_t));
161
162 if( !(yc & 0xffffff00) )
163 {
164 cache[GetIndex(xc, yc, zc)] = old[0];
165 cache[GetIndex(xc - 1, yc, zc)] = old[1];
166 cache[GetIndex(xc + 1, yc, zc)] = old[2];
167 cache[GetIndex(xc, yc, zc - 1)] = old[5];
168 cache[GetIndex(xc, yc, zc + 1)] = old[6];
169 }
170 if( !((yc-1) & 0xffffff00) )
171 {
172 cache[GetIndex(xc, yc - 1, zc)] = old[3];
173 }
174 if( !((yc+1) & 0xffffff00) )
175 {
176 cache[GetIndex(xc, yc + 1, zc)] = old[4];
177 }
178}
179
180// Set a brightness value, going through the cache if enabled for this thread
181void inline Level::setBrightnessCached(lightCache_t *cache, uint64_t *cacheUse, LightLayer::variety layer, int x, int y, int z, int brightness)
182{
183 if( cache == nullptr )
184 {
185 setBrightness(layer, x, y, z, brightness, true);
186 return;
187 }
188 if( y & 0xffffff00 ) return; // Eliminate -ve ys and values > 255
189
190 int idx = ( ( x & 15 ) << 8 ) |
191 ( ( y & 15 ) << 4 ) |
192 ( z & 15 );
193 lightCache_t posbits = ( ( x & 0x3f0 ) << 6 ) |
194 ( ( y & 0x0f0 ) << 2 ) |
195 ( ( z & 0x3f0 ) >> 4 );
196#ifdef _LARGE_WORLDS
197 // Add in the higher bits for x and z
198 posbits |= ( ( static_cast<uint64_t>(x) & 0x3FFFC00L) << 38) |
199 ( ( static_cast<uint64_t>(z) & 0x3FFFC00L) << 22);
200#endif
201
202 lightCache_t cacheValue = cache[idx];
203
204 // If this cache entry doesn't refer to the same thing...
205 if( ( cacheValue & POSITION_MASK ) != posbits )
206 {
208 if( cacheValue & LIGHTING_WRITEBACK )
209 {
210 // Then we need to flush
211 int val = ( cacheValue >> LIGHTING_SHIFT ) & 15;
212 int xx = ( (cacheValue >> 6 ) & 0x3f0 ) | ( x & 15 );
213#ifdef _LARGE_WORLDS
214 xx |= ( (cacheValue >> 38) & 0x3FFFC00);
215 xx = ( xx << 6 ) >> 6; // sign extend
216#else
217 xx = ( xx << 22 ) >> 22; // sign extend
218#endif
219 int yy = ( (cacheValue >> 2 ) & 0x0f0 ) | ( y & 15 );
220 int zz = ( (cacheValue << 4 ) & 0x3f0 ) | ( z & 15 );
221#ifdef _LARGE_WORLDS
222 zz |= ( (cacheValue >> 22) & 0x3FFFC00);
223 zz = ( zz << 6 ) >> 6; // sign extend
224#else
225 zz = ( zz << 22 ) >> 22; // sign extend
226#endif
227 setBrightness(layer, xx, yy, zz, val, true);
228 }
229 cacheValue = posbits;
230 }
231
232 // Just written to it, so value is valid & requires writing back
233 cacheValue &= ~(15 << LIGHTING_SHIFT );
234 cacheValue |= brightness << LIGHTING_SHIFT;
235 cacheValue |= ( LIGHTING_WRITEBACK | LIGHTING_VALID );
236
237 // cacheUse has a single bit for each x, y and z to say whether anything with that x, y or z has been written to
238 (*cacheUse) |= ( ( 1LL << ( x & 15 ) ) | ( 0x10000LL << ( y & 15 ) ) | ( 0x100000000LL << ( z & 15 ) ) );
239
240 cache[idx] = cacheValue;
241}
242
243// Get a brightness value, going through the cache if enabled for this thread
244inline int Level::getBrightnessCached(lightCache_t *cache, LightLayer::variety layer, int x, int y, int z)
245{
246 if( cache == nullptr ) return getBrightness(layer, x, y, z);
247 if( y & 0xffffff00 ) return getBrightness(layer, x, y, z); // Fall back on original method for out-of-bounds y
248
249 int idx = ( ( x & 15 ) << 8 ) |
250 ( ( y & 15 ) << 4 ) |
251 ( z & 15 );
252 lightCache_t posbits = ( ( x & 0x3f0 ) << 6 ) |
253 ( ( y & 0x0f0 ) << 2 ) |
254 ( ( z & 0x3f0 ) >> 4 );
255#ifdef _LARGE_WORLDS
256 posbits |= ( ( static_cast<uint64_t>(x) & 0x3FFFC00L) << 38) |
257 ( ( static_cast<uint64_t>(z) & 0x3FFFC00L) << 22);
258#endif
259
260 lightCache_t cacheValue = cache[idx];
261
262 if( ( cacheValue & POSITION_MASK ) != posbits )
263 {
264 // Position differs - need to evict this cache entry
265 if( cacheValue & LIGHTING_WRITEBACK )
266 {
267 // Then we need to flush
268 int val = ( cacheValue >> LIGHTING_SHIFT ) & 15;
269 int xx = ( (cacheValue >> 6 ) & 0x3f0 ) | ( x & 15 );
270#ifdef _LARGE_WORLDS
271 xx |= ( (cacheValue >> 38) & 0x3FFFC00);
272 xx = ( xx << 6 ) >> 6; // sign extend
273#else
274 xx = ( xx << 22 ) >> 22; // sign extend
275#endif
276 int yy = ( (cacheValue >> 2 ) & 0x0f0 ) | ( y & 15 );
277 int zz = ( (cacheValue << 4 ) & 0x3f0 ) | ( z & 15 );
278#ifdef _LARGE_WORLDS
279 zz |= ( (cacheValue >> 22) & 0x3FFFC00);
280 zz = ( zz << 6 ) >> 6; // sign extend
281#else
282 zz = ( zz << 22 ) >> 22; // sign extend
283#endif
284 setBrightness(layer, xx, yy, zz, val, true);
285 }
286 cacheValue = posbits | LIGHTING_VALID;
287 int val = getBrightness(layer, x, y, z);
288 cacheValue |= val << LIGHTING_SHIFT;
289 }
290 else
291 {
292 // The position matches - will incurr a read miss if the lighting value isn't valid
293 if( ( cacheValue & LIGHTING_VALID ) == 0 )
294 {
295 int val = getBrightness(layer, x, y, z);
296 cacheValue |= val << LIGHTING_SHIFT;
297 cacheValue |= LIGHTING_VALID;
298 }
299 else
300 {
301 // All valid - just return value
302 return ( cacheValue >> LIGHTING_SHIFT ) & 15;
303 }
304 }
305
306 cache[idx] = cacheValue;
307 return ( cacheValue >> LIGHTING_SHIFT ) & 15;
308}
309
310// Get a block emission value, going through the cache if enabled for this thread
311inline int Level::getEmissionCached(lightCache_t *cache, int ct, int x, int y, int z)
312{
313 if( cache == nullptr ) return Tile::lightEmission[ct];
314
315 int idx = ( ( x & 15 ) << 8 ) |
316 ( ( y & 15 ) << 4 ) |
317 ( z & 15 );
318 lightCache_t posbits = ( ( x & 0x3f0 ) << 6 ) |
319 ( ( y & 0x0f0 ) << 2 ) |
320 ( ( z & 0x3f0 ) >> 4 );
321#ifdef _LARGE_WORLDS
322 // Add in the higher bits for x and z
323 posbits |= ( ( static_cast<uint64_t>(x) & 0x3FFFC00) << 38) |
324 ( ( static_cast<uint64_t>(z) & 0x3FFFC00) << 22);
325#endif
326
327 lightCache_t cacheValue = cache[idx];
328
329 if( ( cacheValue & POSITION_MASK ) != posbits )
330 {
331 // Position differs - need to evict this cache entry
332 if( cacheValue & LIGHTING_WRITEBACK )
333 {
334 // Then we need to flush
335 int val = ( cacheValue >> LIGHTING_SHIFT ) & 15;
336 int xx = ( (cacheValue >> 6 ) & 0x3f0 ) | ( x & 15 );
337#ifdef _LARGE_WORLDS
338 xx |= ( (cacheValue >> 38) & 0x3FFFC00);
339 xx = ( xx << 6 ) >> 6; // sign extend
340#else
341 xx = ( xx << 22 ) >> 22; // sign extend
342#endif
343 int yy = ( (cacheValue >> 2 ) & 0x0f0 ) | ( y & 15 );
344 int zz = ( (cacheValue << 4 ) & 0x3f0 ) | ( z & 15 );
345#ifdef _LARGE_WORLDS
346 zz |= ( (cacheValue >> 22) & 0x3FFFC00);
347 zz = ( zz << 6 ) >> 6; // sign extend
348#else
349 zz = ( zz << 22 ) >> 22; // sign extend
350#endif
351 setBrightness(LightLayer::Block, xx, yy, zz, val, true);
352 }
353
354 // Update both emission & blocking values whilst we are here
355 cacheValue = posbits | EMISSION_VALID | BLOCKING_VALID;
356 int t = getTile(x,y,z);
357 cacheValue |= ( Tile::lightEmission[t] & 15 ) << EMISSION_SHIFT;
358 cacheValue |= ( Tile::lightBlock[t] & 15 ) << BLOCKING_SHIFT;
359 }
360 else
361 {
362 // The position matches - will incurr a read miss if the lighting value isn't valid
363 if( ( cacheValue & EMISSION_VALID ) == 0 )
364 {
365 // Update both emission & blocking values whilst we are here
366 cacheValue |= EMISSION_VALID | BLOCKING_VALID;
367 int t = getTile(x,y,z);
368 cacheValue |= ( Tile::lightEmission[t] & 15 ) << EMISSION_SHIFT;
369 cacheValue |= ( Tile::lightBlock[t] & 15 ) << BLOCKING_SHIFT;
370 }
371 else
372 {
373 // All valid - just return value
374 return ( cacheValue >> EMISSION_SHIFT ) & 15;
375 }
376 }
377 cache[idx] = cacheValue;
378 return ( cacheValue >> EMISSION_SHIFT ) & 15;
379}
380
381// Get a tile light blocking value, going through cache if enabled for this thread
382inline int Level::getBlockingCached(lightCache_t *cache, LightLayer::variety layer, int *ct, int x, int y, int z)
383{
384 if( cache == nullptr )
385 {
386 int t = getTile(x,y,z);
387 if(ct) *ct = t;
388 return Tile::lightBlock[t];
389 }
390
391 int idx = ( ( x & 15 ) << 8 ) |
392 ( ( y & 15 ) << 4 ) |
393 ( z & 15 );
394 lightCache_t posbits = ( ( x & 0x3f0 ) << 6 ) |
395 ( ( y & 0x0f0 ) << 2 ) |
396 ( ( z & 0x3f0 ) >> 4 );
397#ifdef _LARGE_WORLDS
398 // Add in the higher bits for x and z
399 posbits |= ( ( static_cast<uint64_t>(x) & 0x3FFFC00L) << 38) |
400 ( ( static_cast<uint64_t>(z) & 0x3FFFC00L) << 22);
401#endif
402
403 lightCache_t cacheValue = cache[idx];
404
405 if( ( cacheValue & POSITION_MASK ) != posbits )
406 {
407 // Position differs - need to evict this cache entry
408 if( cacheValue & LIGHTING_WRITEBACK )
409 {
410 // Then we need to flush
411 int val = ( cacheValue >> LIGHTING_SHIFT ) & 15;
412 int xx = ( (cacheValue >> 6 ) & 0x3f0 ) | ( x & 15 );
413#ifdef _LARGE_WORLDS
414 xx |= ( (cacheValue >> 38) & 0x3FFFC00);
415 xx = ( xx << 6 ) >> 6; // sign extend
416#else
417 xx = ( xx << 22 ) >> 22; // sign extend
418#endif
419 int yy = ( (cacheValue >> 2 ) & 0x0f0 ) | ( y & 15 );
420 int zz = ( (cacheValue << 4 ) & 0x3f0 ) | ( z & 15 );
421#ifdef _LARGE_WORLDS
422 zz |= ( (cacheValue >> 22) & 0x3FFFC00);
423 zz = ( zz << 6 ) >> 6; // sign extend
424#else
425 zz = ( zz << 22 ) >> 22; // sign extend
426#endif
427 setBrightness(layer, xx, yy, zz, val, true);
428 }
429
430 // Update both emission & blocking values whilst we are here
431 cacheValue = posbits | EMISSION_VALID | BLOCKING_VALID;
432 int t = getTile(x,y,z);
433 cacheValue |= ( Tile::lightEmission[t] & 15 ) << EMISSION_SHIFT;
434 cacheValue |= ( Tile::lightBlock[t] & 15 ) << BLOCKING_SHIFT;
435 }
436 else
437 {
438 // The position matches - will incurr a read miss if the lighting value isn't valid
439 if( ( cacheValue & EMISSION_VALID ) == 0 )
440 {
441 // Update both emission & blocking values whilst we are here
442 cacheValue |= EMISSION_VALID | BLOCKING_VALID;
443 int t = getTile(x,y,z);
444 cacheValue |= ( Tile::lightEmission[t] & 15 ) << EMISSION_SHIFT;
445 cacheValue |= ( Tile::lightBlock[t] & 15 ) << BLOCKING_SHIFT;
446 }
447 else
448 {
449 // All valid - just return value
450 return ( cacheValue >> BLOCKING_SHIFT ) & 15;
451 }
452 }
453
454 cache[idx] = cacheValue;
455 return ( cacheValue >> BLOCKING_SHIFT ) & 15;
456}
457
458// Write back any dirty entries in the lighting cache. Also calls the setTilesDirty method on the region which has been updated during this lighting update, since
459// this hasn't been updated (for client threads) for each individual lighting update as would have been the case with the non-cached lighting. There's two reasons for this
460// (1) it's more efficient, since we aren't doing so many individual calls to the level listener to let the renderer know what has been updated
461// (2) it lets the lighting actually complete before we get any visual representation of the update, otherwise we end up seeing some strange partial updates
462void Level::flushCache(lightCache_t *cache, uint64_t cacheUse, LightLayer::variety layer)
463{
464 // cacheUse has a single bit for each x, y and z to say whether anything with that x, y or z has been written to
465 if( cacheUse == 0 ) return;
466 if( cache )
467 {
468 lightCache_t *pcache = cache;
469 for( int x = 0; x < 16; x++ )
470 {
471 if( ( cacheUse & ( 1LL << x ) ) == 0 )
472 {
473 pcache += 16 * 16;
474 continue;
475 }
476 for( int y = 0; y < 16; y++ )
477 {
478 if( ( cacheUse & ( 0x10000LL << y ) ) == 0 )
479 {
480 pcache += 16;
481 continue;
482 }
483 for( int z = 0; z < 16; z++ )
484 {
485 if( ( cacheUse & ( 0x100000000LL << z ) ) == 0 )
486 {
487 pcache++;
488 continue;
489 }
490 lightCache_t cacheValue = *pcache++;
491 if( cacheValue & LIGHTING_WRITEBACK )
492 {
493 int val = ( cacheValue >> LIGHTING_SHIFT ) & 15;
494 int xx = ( (cacheValue >> 6 ) & 0x3f0 ) | ( x & 15 );
495#ifdef _LARGE_WORLDS
496 xx |= ( (cacheValue >> 38) & 0x3FFFC00);
497 xx = ( xx << 6 ) >> 6; // sign extend
498#else
499 xx = ( xx << 22 ) >> 22; // sign extend
500#endif
501 int yy = ( (cacheValue >> 2 ) & 0x0f0 ) | ( y & 15 );
502 int zz = ( (cacheValue << 4 ) & 0x3f0 ) | ( z & 15 );
503#ifdef _LARGE_WORLDS
504 zz |= ( (cacheValue >> 22) & 0x3FFFC00);
505 zz = ( zz << 6 ) >> 6; // sign extend
506#else
507 zz = ( zz << 22 ) >> 22; // sign extend
508#endif
509 setBrightness(layer, xx, yy, zz, val, true);
510 }
511 }
512 }
513 }
514 }
515 // For client side (which has the renderer attached) we haven't been updating with each individual update, but have been gathering them up.
516 // Let the renderer know now the region that has been updated.
517 if( isClientSide && cachewritten)
518 {
519 setTilesDirty(cacheminx, cacheminy, cacheminz,cachemaxx,cachemaxy,cachemaxz);
520 }
521}

523// 4J - added following 2 functions to move instaBuild flag from being a class member, to TLS
524bool Level::getInstaTick()
525{
526 return ((size_t)TlsGetValue(tlsIdx)) != 0;
527}
528
529void Level::setInstaTick(bool enable)
530{
531 void *value = 0;
532 if( enable ) value = (void *)1;
533 TlsSetValue(tlsIdx,value);
534}
535
536// 4J - added
537bool Level::hasEntitiesToRemove()
538{
539 return !entitiesToRemove.empty();
540}
541
542void Level::_init()
543{
544 cloudColor = 0xffffff;
545
546 skyDarken = 0;
547
548 randValue = (new Random())->nextInt();
549
550 addend = 1013904223;
551
552 oRainLevel = rainLevel = 0.0f;
553
554 oThunderLevel = thunderLevel = 0.0f;
555
556 skyFlashTime = 0;
557
558 difficulty = 0;
559
560 random = new Random();
561 isNew = false;
562
563 dimension = nullptr;
564
565 chunkSource = nullptr;
566
567 levelStorage = nullptr;
568
569 levelData = nullptr;
570
571 isFindingSpawn = false;
572
573 savedDataStorage = nullptr;
574
575 spawnEnemies = true;
576
577 spawnFriendlies = true;
578
579 delayUntilNextMoodSound = random->nextInt(20 * 60 * 10);
580
581 isClientSide = false;
582
583 InitializeCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
584 InitializeCriticalSection(&m_tileEntityListCS);
585
586 updatingTileEntities = false;
587
588 villageSiege = new VillageSiege(this);
589 scoreboard = new Scoreboard();
590
591 toCheckLevel = new int[ 32 * 32 * 32]; // 4J - brought forward from 1.8.2
592 InitializeCriticalSectionAndSpinCount(&m_checkLightCS, 5120); // 4J - added for 1.8.2 lighting
593
594 // 4J Added
595 m_bDisableAddNewTileEntities = false;
596 m_iHighestY=-1000;
597 m_unsavedChunkCount = 0;
598}
599
600// 4J - brought forward from 1.8.2
601Biome *Level::getBiome(int x, int z)
602{
603 if (hasChunkAt(x, 0, z))
604 {
605 LevelChunk *lc = getChunkAt(x, z);
606 if (lc != nullptr)
607 {
608 // Water chunks at the edge of the world return nullptr for their biome as they can't store it, so should fall back on the normal method below
609 Biome *biome = lc->getBiome(x & 0xf, z & 0xf, dimension->biomeSource);
610 if( biome ) return biome;
611 }
612 }
613 return dimension->biomeSource->getBiome(x, z);
614}
615
616BiomeSource *Level::getBiomeSource()
617{
618 return dimension->biomeSource;
619}
620
621Level::Level(shared_ptr<LevelStorage> levelStorage, const wstring& name, Dimension *dimension, LevelSettings *levelSettings, bool doCreateChunkSource)
622 : seaLevel(constSeaLevel)
623{
624 _init();
625 this->levelStorage = levelStorage;//shared_ptr<LevelStorage>(levelStorage);
626 this->dimension = dimension;
627 levelData = new LevelData(levelSettings, name);
628 if( !this->levelData->useNewSeaLevel() ) seaLevel = Level::genDepth / 2; // 4J added - sea level is one unit lower since 1.8.2, maintain older height for old levels
629 savedDataStorage = new SavedDataStorage(levelStorage.get());
630
631 shared_ptr<Villages> savedVillages = dynamic_pointer_cast<Villages>(savedDataStorage->get(typeid(Villages), Villages::VILLAGE_FILE_ID));
632 if (savedVillages == nullptr)
633 {
634 villages = std::make_shared<Villages>(this);
635 savedDataStorage->set(Villages::VILLAGE_FILE_ID, villages);
636 }
637 else
638 {
639 villages = savedVillages;
640 villages->setLevel(this);
641 }
642
643 dimension->init(this);
644 chunkSource = nullptr; // 4J - added flag so chunk source can be called from derived class instead
645
646 updateSkyBrightness();
647 prepareWeather();
648}
649
650Level::Level(shared_ptr<LevelStorage>levelStorage, const wstring& levelName, LevelSettings *levelSettings)
651 : seaLevel( constSeaLevel )
652{
653 _init(levelStorage, levelName, levelSettings, nullptr, true);
654}
655
656
657Level::Level(shared_ptr<LevelStorage>levelStorage, const wstring& levelName, LevelSettings *levelSettings, Dimension *fixedDimension, bool doCreateChunkSource)
658 : seaLevel( constSeaLevel )
659{
660 _init( levelStorage, levelName, levelSettings, fixedDimension, doCreateChunkSource );
661}
662
663void Level::_init(shared_ptr<LevelStorage>levelStorage, const wstring& levelName, LevelSettings *levelSettings, Dimension *fixedDimension, bool doCreateChunkSource)
664{
665 _init();
666 this->levelStorage = levelStorage;//shared_ptr<LevelStorage>(levelStorage);
667 savedDataStorage = new SavedDataStorage(levelStorage.get());
668
669 shared_ptr<Villages> savedVillages = dynamic_pointer_cast<Villages>(savedDataStorage->get(typeid(Villages), Villages::VILLAGE_FILE_ID));
670 if (savedVillages == nullptr)
671 {
672 villages = std::make_shared<Villages>(this);
673 savedDataStorage->set(Villages::VILLAGE_FILE_ID, villages);
674 }
675 else
676 {
677 villages = savedVillages;
678 villages->setLevel(this);
679 }
680
681 levelData = levelStorage->prepareLevel();
682 isNew = levelData == nullptr;
683
684 if (fixedDimension != nullptr)
685 {
686 dimension = fixedDimension;
687 }
688 // 4J Remove TU9 as getDimensions was never accurate. This path was never used anyway as we always set fixedDimension
689 //else if (levelData != nullptr && levelData->getDimension() != 0)
690 //{
691 // dimension = Dimension::getNew(levelData->getDimension());
692 //}
693 else
694 {
695 dimension = Dimension::getNew(0);
696 }
697
698 if (levelData == nullptr)
699 {
700 levelData = new LevelData(levelSettings, levelName);
701 }
702 else
703 {
704 levelData->setLevelName(levelName);
705 }
706 if( !this->levelData->useNewSeaLevel() ) seaLevel = Level::genDepth / 2; // 4J added - sea level is one unit lower since 1.8.2, maintain older height for old levels
707
708 ((Dimension *) dimension)->init( this );
709
710 chunkSource = doCreateChunkSource ? createChunkSource() : nullptr; // 4J - added flag so chunk source can be called from derived class instead
711
712 // 4J Stu- Moved to derived classes
713 //if (!levelData->isInitialized())
714 //{
715 // initializeLevel(levelSettings);
716 // levelData->setInitialized(true);
717 //}
718
719 updateSkyBrightness();
720 prepareWeather();
721
722}
723
724Level::~Level()
725{
726 delete random;
727 delete dimension;
728 delete chunkSource;
729 delete levelData;
730 delete toCheckLevel;
731 delete scoreboard;
732 delete villageSiege;
733
734 if( !isClientSide )
735 {
736 NotGateTile::removeLevelReferences(this); // 4J added
737 }
738
739 DeleteCriticalSection(&m_checkLightCS);
740
741 // 4J-PB - savedDataStorage is shared between overworld and nether levels in the server, so it will already have been deleted on the first level delete
742 if(savedDataStorage!=nullptr) delete savedDataStorage;
743
744 DeleteCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
745 DeleteCriticalSection(&m_tileEntityListCS);
746
747 // 4J Stu - At least one of the listeners is something we cannot delete, the LevelRenderer
748 /*
749 for(int i = 0; i < listeners.size(); i++)
750 delete listeners[i];
751 */
752}
753
754void Level::initializeLevel(LevelSettings *settings)
755{
756 levelData->setInitialized(true);
757}
758
759void Level::validateSpawn()
760{
761 setSpawnPos(8, 64, 8);
762}
763
764int Level::getTopTile(int x, int z)
765{
766 // 4J added - was breaking spawning as not finding ground in superflat worlds
767 if( levelData->getGenerator() == LevelType::lvl_flat )
768 {
769 return Tile::grass_Id;
770 }
771
772 int y = seaLevel;
773 while (!isEmptyTile(x, y + 1, z))
774 {
775 y++;
776 }
777 return getTile(x, y, z);
778}
779int Level::getTile(int x, int y, int z)
780{
781 if (x < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || x >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE)
782 {
783 return 0;
784 }
785 if (y < minBuildHeight) return 0;
786 if (y >= maxBuildHeight) return 0;
787 return getChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4)->getTile(x & 15, y, z & 15);
788}
789
790int Level::getTileLightBlock(int x, int y, int z)
791{
792 if (x < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || x >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE)
793 {
794 return 0;
795 }
796 if (y < minBuildHeight) return 0;
797 if (y >= maxBuildHeight) return 0;
798 return getChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4)->getTileLightBlock(x & 15, y, z & 15);
799}
800
801bool Level::isEmptyTile(int x, int y, int z)
802{
803 return getTile(x, y, z) == 0;
804}
805
806bool Level::isEntityTile(int x, int y, int z)
807{
808 int t = getTile(x, y, z);
809 if (Tile::tiles[t] != nullptr && Tile::tiles[t]->isEntityTile())
810 {
811 return true;
812 }
813 return false;
814}
815
816int Level::getTileRenderShape(int x, int y, int z)
817{
818 int t = getTile(x, y, z);
819 if (Tile::tiles[t] != nullptr)
820 {
821 return Tile::tiles[t]->getRenderShape();
822 }
823 return Tile::SHAPE_INVISIBLE;
824}
825
826// 4J Added to slightly optimise and avoid getTile call if we already know the tile
827int Level::getTileRenderShape(int t)
828{
829 if (Tile::tiles[t] != nullptr)
830 {
831 return Tile::tiles[t]->getRenderShape();
832 }
833 return Tile::SHAPE_INVISIBLE;
834}
835
836bool Level::hasChunkAt(int x, int y, int z)
837{
838 if (y < minBuildHeight || y >= maxBuildHeight) return false;
839 return hasChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4);
840}
841
842// 4J added
843bool Level::reallyHasChunkAt(int x, int y, int z)
844{
845 if (y < minBuildHeight || y >= maxBuildHeight) return false;
846 return reallyHasChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4);
847}
848
849bool Level::hasChunksAt(int x, int y, int z, int r)
850{
851 return hasChunksAt(x - r, y - r, z - r, x + r, y + r, z + r);
852}
853
854// 4J added
855bool Level::reallyHasChunksAt(int x, int y, int z, int r)
856{
857 return reallyHasChunksAt(x - r, y - r, z - r, x + r, y + r, z + r);
858}
859
860
861bool Level::hasChunksAt(int x0, int y0, int z0, int x1, int y1, int z1)
862{
863 if (y1 < minBuildHeight || y0 >= maxBuildHeight) return false;
864
865 x0 >>= 4;
866 z0 >>= 4;
867 x1 >>= 4;
868 z1 >>= 4;
869
870 for (int x = x0; x <= x1; x++)
871 for (int z = z0; z <= z1; z++)
872 if (!hasChunk(x, z)) return false;
873
874 return true;
875}
876
877// 4J added
878bool Level::reallyHasChunksAt(int x0, int y0, int z0, int x1, int y1, int z1)
879{
880 x0 >>= 4;
881 z0 >>= 4;
882 x1 >>= 4;
883 z1 >>= 4;
884
885 for (int x = x0; x <= x1; x++)
886 for (int z = z0; z <= z1; z++)
887 if (!reallyHasChunk(x, z)) return false;
888
889 return true;
890}
891
892bool Level::hasChunk(int x, int z)
893{
894 return this->chunkSource->hasChunk(x, z);
895}
896
897// 4J added
898bool Level::reallyHasChunk(int x, int z)
899{
900 return this->chunkSource->reallyHasChunk(x, z);
901}
902
903
904LevelChunk *Level::getChunkAt(int x, int z)
905{
906 return getChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4);
907}
908
909
910LevelChunk *Level::getChunk(int x, int z)
911{
912 return this->chunkSource->getChunk(x, z);
913}
914
915bool Level::setTileAndData(int x, int y, int z, int tile, int data, int updateFlags)
916{
917 if (x < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || x >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE)
918 {
919 return false;
920 }
921 if (y < 0) return false;
922 if (y >= maxBuildHeight) return false;
923 LevelChunk *c = getChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4);
924
925 int oldTile = 0;
926 if ((updateFlags & Tile::UPDATE_NEIGHBORS) != 0)
927 {
928 oldTile = c->getTile(x & 15, y, z & 15);
929 }
930 bool result;
931#ifndef _CONTENT_PACKAGE
932 int old = c->getTile(x & 15, y, z & 15);
933 int olddata = c->getData( x & 15, y, z & 15);
934#endif
935 result = c->setTileAndData(x & 15, y, z & 15, tile, data);
936 if( updateFlags != Tile::UPDATE_INVISIBLE_NO_LIGHT)
937 {
938#ifndef _CONTENT_PACKAGE
939 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"Checking light %d %d %d",x,y,z);
940 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"was %d, %d now %d, %d",old,olddata,tile,data);
941#endif
942 checkLight(x, y, z);
943 PIXEndNamedEvent();
944 PIXEndNamedEvent();
945 }
946 if (result)
947 {
948 if ((updateFlags & Tile::UPDATE_CLIENTS) != 0 && !(isClientSide && (updateFlags & Tile::UPDATE_INVISIBLE) != 0))
949 {
950 sendTileUpdated(x, y, z);
951 }
952 if (!isClientSide && (updateFlags & Tile::UPDATE_NEIGHBORS) != 0)
953 {
954 tileUpdated(x, y, z, oldTile);
955 Tile *tobj = Tile::tiles[tile];
956 if (tobj != nullptr && tobj->hasAnalogOutputSignal()) updateNeighbourForOutputSignal(x, y, z, tile);
957 }
958 }
959 return result;
960}
961
962Material *Level::getMaterial(int x, int y, int z)
963{
964 int t = getTile(x, y, z);
965 if (t == 0) return Material::air;
966 return Tile::tiles[t]->material;
967}
968
969int Level::getData(int x, int y, int z)
970{
971 if (x < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || x >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE)
972 {
973 return 0;
974 }
975 if (y < 0) return 0;
976 if (y >= maxBuildHeight) return 0;
977 LevelChunk *c = getChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4);
978 x &= 15;
979 z &= 15;
980 return c->getData(x, y, z);
981}
982
983bool Level::setData(int x, int y, int z, int data, int updateFlags, bool forceUpdate/*=false*/) // 4J added forceUpdate)
984{
985 if (x < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || x >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE)
986 {
987 return false;
988 }
989 if (y < 0) return false;
990 if (y >= maxBuildHeight) return false;
991 LevelChunk *c = getChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4);
992 int cx = x & 15;
993 int cz = z & 15;
994 // 4J - have changed _sendTileData to encode a bitfield of which bits are important to be sent. This will be zero where the original flag was false, and non-zero where the original
995 // flag was true - hence recreating the original flag as sendTileData here. For nearly all tiles this will be 15 for the case where this used to be true (ie all bits are important) so
996 // there should be absolutely to change in behaviour. However, for leaf tiles, bits have been masked so we don't bother doing sendTileUpdated if a non-visual thing has changed in the data
997 unsigned char importantMask = Tile::_sendTileData[c->getTile(cx, y, cz) & Tile::TILE_NUM_MASK];
998 bool sendTileData = importantMask != 0;
999
1000 bool maskedBitsChanged;
1001 bool result = c->setData(cx, y, cz, data, importantMask, &maskedBitsChanged);
1002 if (result || forceUpdate)
1003 {
1004 int tile = c->getTile(cx, y, cz);
1005 if (forceUpdate || ((updateFlags & Tile::UPDATE_CLIENTS) != 0 && !(isClientSide && (updateFlags & Tile::UPDATE_INVISIBLE) != 0)))
1006 {
1007 sendTileUpdated(x, y, z);
1008 }
1009 if (!isClientSide && (forceUpdate || (updateFlags & Tile::UPDATE_NEIGHBORS) != 0) )
1010 {
1011 tileUpdated(x, y, z, tile);
1012 Tile *tobj = Tile::tiles[tile];
1013 if (tobj != nullptr && tobj->hasAnalogOutputSignal()) updateNeighbourForOutputSignal(x, y, z, tile);
1014 }
1015 }
1016 return result;
1017}
1018
1027bool Level::removeTile(int x, int y, int z)
1028{
1029 return setTileAndData(x, y, z, 0, 0, Tile::UPDATE_ALL);
1030}
1031
1042bool Level::destroyTile(int x, int y, int z, bool dropResources)
1043{
1044 int tile = getTile(x, y, z);
1045 if (tile > 0)
1046 {
1047 int data = getData(x, y, z);
1048 levelEvent(LevelEvent::PARTICLES_DESTROY_BLOCK, x, y, z, tile + (data << Tile::TILE_NUM_SHIFT));
1049 if (dropResources)
1050 {
1051 Tile::tiles[tile]->spawnResources(this, x, y, z, data, 0);
1052 }
1053 return setTileAndData(x, y, z, 0, 0, Tile::UPDATE_ALL);
1054 }
1055 return false;
1056}
1057
1058bool Level::setTileAndUpdate(int x, int y, int z, int tile)
1059{
1060 return setTileAndData(x, y, z, tile, 0, Tile::UPDATE_ALL);
1061}
1062
1063void Level::sendTileUpdated(int x, int y, int z)
1064{
1065 for (auto& listener : listeners)
1066 {
1067 listener->tileChanged(x, y, z);
1068 }
1069}
1070
1071void Level::tileUpdated(int x, int y, int z, int tile)
1072{
1073 updateNeighborsAt(x, y, z, tile);
1074}
1075
1076void Level::lightColumnChanged(int x, int z, int y0, int y1)
1077{
1078 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"LightColumnChanged (%d,%d) %d to %d",x,z,y0,y1);
1079 if (y0 > y1)
1080 {
1081 int tmp = y1;
1082 y1 = y0;
1083 y0 = tmp;
1084 }
1085
1086 if (!dimension->hasCeiling)
1087 {
1088 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"Checking lights");
1089 for (int y = y0; y <= y1; y++)
1090 {
1091 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"Checking light %d", y);
1092 checkLight(LightLayer::Sky, x, y, z);
1093 PIXEndNamedEvent();
1094 }
1095 PIXEndNamedEvent();
1096 }
1097 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"Setting tiles dirty");
1098 setTilesDirty(x, y0, z, x, y1, z);
1099 PIXEndNamedEvent();
1100 PIXEndNamedEvent();
1101}
1102
1103
1104void Level::setTileDirty(int x, int y, int z)
1105{
1106 for (auto& listener : listeners)
1107 {
1108 listener->setTilesDirty(x, y, z, x, y, z, this);
1109 }
1110}
1111
1112
1113void Level::setTilesDirty(int x0, int y0, int z0, int x1, int y1, int z1)
1114{
1115 for (auto& listener : listeners)
1116 {
1117 listener->setTilesDirty(x0, y0, z0, x1, y1, z1, this);
1118 }
1119}
1120
1121void Level::updateNeighborsAt(int x, int y, int z, int tile)
1122{
1123 neighborChanged(x - 1, y, z, tile);
1124 neighborChanged(x + 1, y, z, tile);
1125 neighborChanged(x, y - 1, z, tile);
1126 neighborChanged(x, y + 1, z, tile);
1127 neighborChanged(x, y, z - 1, tile);
1128 neighborChanged(x, y, z + 1, tile);
1129}
1130
1131void Level::updateNeighborsAtExceptFromFacing(int x, int y, int z, int tile, int skipFacing)
1132{
1133 if (skipFacing != Facing::WEST) neighborChanged(x - 1, y, z, tile);
1134 if (skipFacing != Facing::EAST) neighborChanged(x + 1, y, z, tile);
1135 if (skipFacing != Facing::DOWN) neighborChanged(x, y - 1, z, tile);
1136 if (skipFacing != Facing::UP) neighborChanged(x, y + 1, z, tile);
1137 if (skipFacing != Facing::NORTH) neighborChanged(x, y, z - 1, tile);
1138 if (skipFacing != Facing::SOUTH) neighborChanged(x, y, z + 1, tile);
1139}
1140
1141void Level::neighborChanged(int x, int y, int z, int type)
1142{
1143 if (isClientSide) return;
1144 int id = getTile(x, y, z);
1145 Tile *tile = Tile::tiles[id];
1146
1147 if (tile != nullptr)
1148 {
1149 tile->neighborChanged(this, x, y, z, type);
1150 }
1151}
1152
1153bool Level::isTileToBeTickedAt(int x, int y, int z, int tileId)
1154{
1155 return false;
1156}
1157
1158bool Level::canSeeSky(int x, int y, int z)
1159{
1160 return getChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4)->isSkyLit(x & 15, y, z & 15);
1161}
1162
1163
1164int Level::getDaytimeRawBrightness(int x, int y, int z)
1165{
1166 if (y < 0) return 0;
1167 if (y >= maxBuildHeight) y = maxBuildHeight - 1;
1168 return getChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4)->getRawBrightness(x & 15, y, z & 15, 0);
1169}
1170
1171
1172int Level::getRawBrightness(int x, int y, int z)
1173{
1174 return getRawBrightness(x, y, z, true);
1175}
1176
1177
1178int Level::getRawBrightness(int x, int y, int z, bool propagate)
1179{
1180 if (x < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || x >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE)
1181 {
1182 return MAX_BRIGHTNESS;
1183 }
1184
1185 if (propagate)
1186 {
1187 int id = getTile(x, y, z);
1188 if (Tile::propagate[id])
1189 {
1190 int br = getRawBrightness(x, y + 1, z, false);
1191 int br1 = getRawBrightness(x + 1, y, z, false);
1192 int br2 = getRawBrightness(x - 1, y, z, false);
1193 int br3 = getRawBrightness(x, y, z + 1, false);
1194 int br4 = getRawBrightness(x, y, z - 1, false);
1195 if (br1 > br) br = br1;
1196 if (br2 > br) br = br2;
1197 if (br3 > br) br = br3;
1198 if (br4 > br) br = br4;
1199 return br;
1200 }
1201 }
1202
1203 if (y < 0) return 0;
1204 if (y >= maxBuildHeight) y = maxBuildHeight - 1;
1205
1206 LevelChunk *c = getChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4);
1207 x &= 15;
1208 z &= 15;
1209 return c->getRawBrightness(x, y, z, skyDarken);
1210}
1211
1212
1213bool Level::isSkyLit(int x, int y, int z)
1214{
1215 if (x < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || x >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE)
1216 {
1217 return false;
1218 }
1219 if (dimension->hasCeiling) return false;
1220
1221 if (y < 0) return false;
1222 if (y >= maxBuildHeight) return true;
1223 if (!hasChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4)) return false;
1224
1225 LevelChunk *c = getChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4);
1226 x &= 15;
1227 z &= 15;
1228 return c->isSkyLit(x, y, z);
1229}
1230
1231
1232int Level::getHeightmap(int x, int z)
1233{
1234 if (x < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || x >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE)
1235 {
1236 return 0;
1237 }
1238 if (!hasChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4)) return 0;
1239
1240 LevelChunk *c = getChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4);
1241 return c->getHeightmap(x & 15, z & 15);
1242}
1243
1244int Level::getLowestHeightmap(int x, int z)
1245{
1246 if (x < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || x >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE)
1247 {
1248 return 0;
1249 }
1250 if (!hasChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4)) return 0;
1251
1252 LevelChunk *c = getChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4);
1253 return c->lowestHeightmap;
1254}
1255
1256void Level::updateLightIfOtherThan(LightLayer::variety layer, int x, int y, int z, int expected)
1257{
1258 if (dimension->hasCeiling && layer == LightLayer::Sky) return;
1259
1260 if (!hasChunkAt(x, y, z)) return;
1261
1262 if (layer == LightLayer::Sky)
1263 {
1264 if (isSkyLit(x, y, z)) expected = 15;
1265 }
1266 else if (layer == LightLayer::Block)
1267 {
1268 int t = getTile(x, y, z);
1269 if (Tile::lightEmission[t] > expected) expected = Tile::lightEmission[t];
1270 }
1271
1272 if (getBrightness(layer, x, y, z) != expected)
1273 {
1274 setBrightness(layer, x, y, z, expected);
1275 }
1276}
1277
1278// 4J - update brought forward from 1.8.2
1279int Level::getBrightnessPropagate(LightLayer::variety layer, int x, int y, int z, int tileId)
1280{
1281 if (dimension->hasCeiling && layer == LightLayer::Sky) return 0;
1282
1283 if (y < 0) y = 0;
1284 if (y >= maxBuildHeight && layer == LightLayer::Sky)
1285 {
1286 // 4J Stu - The java LightLayer was an enum class type with a member "surrounding" which is what we
1287 // were returning here. Surrounding has the same value as the enum value in our C++ code, so just cast
1288 // it to an int
1289 return (int)layer;
1290 }
1291 if (x < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || x >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE)
1292 {
1293 // 4J Stu - The java LightLayer was an enum class type with a member "surrounding" which is what we
1294 // were returning here. Surrounding has the same value as the enum value in our C++ code, so just cast
1295 // it to an int
1296 return (int)layer;
1297 }
1298 int xc = x >> 4;
1299 int zc = z >> 4;
1300 if (!hasChunk(xc, zc)) return (int)layer;
1301
1302 {
1303 int id = tileId > -1 ? tileId : getTile(x,y,z);
1304 if (Tile::propagate[id])
1305 {
1306 int br = getBrightness(layer, x, y + 1, z);
1307 int br1 = getBrightness(layer, x + 1, y, z);
1308 int br2 = getBrightness(layer, x - 1, y, z);
1309 int br3 = getBrightness(layer, x, y, z + 1);
1310 int br4 = getBrightness(layer, x, y, z - 1);
1311 if (br1 > br) br = br1;
1312 if (br2 > br) br = br2;
1313 if (br3 > br) br = br3;
1314 if (br4 > br) br = br4;
1315 return br;
1316 }
1317 }
1318
1319 LevelChunk *c = getChunk(xc, zc);
1320 return c->getBrightness(layer, x & 15, y, z & 15);
1321}
1322
1323int Level::getBrightness(LightLayer::variety layer, int x, int y, int z)
1324{
1325 // 4J - optimised. Not doing checks on x/z that are no longer necessary, and directly checking the cache within
1326 // the ServerChunkCache/MultiplayerChunkCache rather than going through wrappers & virtual functions.
1327 int xc = x >> 4;
1328 int zc = z >> 4;
1329
1330 int ix = xc + (chunkSourceXZSize/2);
1331 int iz = zc + (chunkSourceXZSize/2);
1332
1333 if( ( ix < 0 ) || ( ix >= chunkSourceXZSize ) ) return 0;
1334 if( ( iz < 0 ) || ( iz >= chunkSourceXZSize ) ) return 0;
1335 int idx = ix * chunkSourceXZSize + iz;
1336 LevelChunk *c = chunkSourceCache[idx];
1337
1338 if( c == nullptr ) return (int)layer;
1339
1340 if (y < 0) y = 0;
1341 if (y >= maxBuildHeight) y = maxBuildHeight - 1;
1342
1343 return c->getBrightness(layer, x & 15, y, z & 15);
1344}
1345
1346// 4J added as optimisation - if all the neighbouring brightesses are going to be in the one chunk, just get
1347// the level chunk once
1348void Level::getNeighbourBrightnesses(int *brightnesses, LightLayer::variety layer, int x, int y, int z)
1349{
1350 if( ( ( ( x & 15 ) == 0 ) || ( ( x & 15 ) == 15 ) ) ||
1351 ( ( ( z & 15 ) == 0 ) || ( ( z & 15 ) == 15 ) ) ||
1352 ( ( y <= 0 ) || ( y >= 127 ) ) )
1353 {
1354 // We're spanning more than one chunk, just fall back on original java method here
1355 brightnesses[0] = getBrightness(layer, x - 1, y, z);
1356 brightnesses[1] = getBrightness(layer, x + 1, y, z);
1357 brightnesses[2] = getBrightness(layer, x, y - 1, z);
1358 brightnesses[3] = getBrightness(layer, x, y + 1, z);
1359 brightnesses[4] = getBrightness(layer, x, y, z - 1);
1360 brightnesses[5] = getBrightness(layer, x, y, z + 1);
1361 }
1362 else
1363 {
1364 // All in one chunk - just get the chunk once, and do a single call to get the results
1365 int xc = x >> 4;
1366 int zc = z >> 4;
1367
1368 int ix = xc + (chunkSourceXZSize/2);
1369 int iz = zc + (chunkSourceXZSize/2);
1370
1371 // 4J Stu - The java LightLayer was an enum class type with a member "surrounding" which is what we
1372 // were returning here. Surrounding has the same value as the enum value in our C++ code, so just cast
1373 // it to an int
1374 if( ( ( ix < 0 ) || ( ix >= chunkSourceXZSize ) ) ||
1375 ( ( iz < 0 ) || ( iz >= chunkSourceXZSize ) ) )
1376 {
1377 for( int i = 0; i < 6; i++ )
1378 {
1379 brightnesses[i] = static_cast<int>(layer);
1380 }
1381 return;
1382 }
1383
1384 int idx = ix * chunkSourceXZSize + iz;
1385 LevelChunk *c = chunkSourceCache[idx];
1386
1387 // 4J Stu - The java LightLayer was an enum class type with a member "surrounding" which is what we
1388 // were returning here. Surrounding has the same value as the enum value in our C++ code, so just cast
1389 // it to an int
1390 if( c == nullptr )
1391 {
1392 for( int i = 0; i < 6; i++ )
1393 {
1394 brightnesses[i] = static_cast<int>(layer);
1395 }
1396 return;
1397 }
1398
1399 // Single call to the levelchunk too to avoid overhead of virtual fn calls
1400 c->getNeighbourBrightnesses(brightnesses, layer, x & 15, y, z & 15);
1401 }
1402}
1403
1404void Level::setBrightness(LightLayer::variety layer, int x, int y, int z, int brightness, bool noUpdateOnClient/*=false*/) // 4J added noUpdateOnClient
1405{
1406 if (x < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || x >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE)
1407 {
1408 return;
1409 }
1410 if (y < 0) return;
1411 if (y >= maxBuildHeight) return;
1412 if (!hasChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4)) return;
1413 LevelChunk *c = getChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4);
1414
1415 c->setBrightness(layer, x & 15, y, z & 15, brightness);
1416
1417 // 4J added
1418 if( isClientSide && noUpdateOnClient )
1419 {
1420 if( cachewritten )
1421 {
1422 if( x < cacheminx ) cacheminx = x;
1423 if( x > cachemaxx ) cachemaxx = x;
1424 if( y < cacheminy ) cacheminy = y;
1425 if( y > cachemaxy ) cachemaxy = y;
1426 if( z < cacheminz ) cacheminz = z;
1427 if( z > cachemaxz ) cachemaxz = z;
1428 }
1429 else
1430 {
1431 cachewritten = true;
1432 cacheminx = x;
1433 cachemaxx = x;
1434 cacheminy = y;
1435 cachemaxy = y;
1436 cacheminz = z;
1437 cachemaxz = z;
1438 }
1439 }
1440 else
1441 {
1442 for (auto& listener : listeners)
1443 {
1444 listener->tileLightChanged(x, y, z);
1445 }
1446 }
1447}
1448
1449void Level::setTileBrightnessChanged(int x, int y, int z)
1450{
1451 for (auto& listener : listeners)
1452 {
1453 listener->tileLightChanged(x, y, z);
1454 }
1455}
1456
1457int Level::getLightColor(int x, int y, int z, int emitt, int tileId/*=-1*/)
1458{
1459 int s = getBrightnessPropagate(LightLayer::Sky, x, y, z, tileId);
1460 int b = getBrightnessPropagate(LightLayer::Block, x, y, z, tileId);
1461 if (b < emitt) b = emitt;
1462 return s << 20 | b << 4;
1463}
1464
1465float Level::getBrightness(int x, int y, int z, int emitt)
1466{
1467 int n = getRawBrightness(x, y, z);
1468 if (n < emitt) n = emitt;
1469 return dimension->brightnessRamp[n];
1470}
1471
1472
1473float Level::getBrightness(int x, int y, int z)
1474{
1475 return dimension->brightnessRamp[getRawBrightness(x, y, z)];
1476}
1477
1478
1479bool Level::isDay()
1480{
1481 return skyDarken < 4;
1482}
1483
1484
1485HitResult *Level::clip(Vec3 *a, Vec3 *b)
1486{
1487 return clip(a, b, false, false);
1488}
1489
1490
1491HitResult *Level::clip(Vec3 *a, Vec3 *b, bool liquid)
1492{
1493 return clip(a, b, liquid, false);
1494}
1495
1496
1497HitResult *Level::clip(Vec3 *a, Vec3 *b, bool liquid, bool solidOnly)
1498{
1499 if (Double::isNaN(a->x) || Double::isNaN(a->y) || Double::isNaN(a->z)) return nullptr;
1500 if (Double::isNaN(b->x) || Double::isNaN(b->y) || Double::isNaN(b->z)) return nullptr;
1501
1502 int xTile1 = Mth::floor(b->x);
1503 int yTile1 = Mth::floor(b->y);
1504 int zTile1 = Mth::floor(b->z);
1505
1506 int xTile0 = Mth::floor(a->x);
1507 int yTile0 = Mth::floor(a->y);
1508 int zTile0 = Mth::floor(a->z);
1509
1510 {
1511 int t = getTile(xTile0, yTile0, zTile0);
1512 int data = getData(xTile0, yTile0, zTile0);
1513 Tile *tile = Tile::tiles[t];
1514 if (solidOnly && tile != nullptr && tile->getAABB(this, xTile0, yTile0, zTile0) == nullptr)
1515 {
1516 // No collision
1517
1518 }
1519 else if (t > 0 && tile->mayPick(data, liquid))
1520 {
1521 HitResult *r = tile->clip(this, xTile0, yTile0, zTile0, a, b);
1522 if (r != nullptr) return r;
1523 }
1524 }
1525
1526 int maxIterations = 200;
1527 while (maxIterations-- >= 0)
1528 {
1529 if (Double::isNaN(a->x) || Double::isNaN(a->y) || Double::isNaN(a->z)) return nullptr;
1530 if (xTile0 == xTile1 && yTile0 == yTile1 && zTile0 == zTile1) return nullptr;
1531
1532 bool xClipped = true;
1533 bool yClipped = true;
1534 bool zClipped = true;
1535
1536 double xClip = 999;
1537 double yClip = 999;
1538 double zClip = 999;
1539
1540 if (xTile1 > xTile0) xClip = xTile0 + 1.000;
1541 else if (xTile1 < xTile0) xClip = xTile0 + 0.000;
1542 else xClipped = false;
1543
1544 if (yTile1 > yTile0) yClip = yTile0 + 1.000;
1545 else if (yTile1 < yTile0) yClip = yTile0 + 0.000;
1546 else yClipped = false;
1547
1548 if (zTile1 > zTile0) zClip = zTile0 + 1.000;
1549 else if (zTile1 < zTile0) zClip = zTile0 + 0.000;
1550 else zClipped = false;
1551
1552 double xDist = 999;
1553 double yDist = 999;
1554 double zDist = 999;
1555
1556 double xd = b->x - a->x;
1557 double yd = b->y - a->y;
1558 double zd = b->z - a->z;
1559
1560 if (xClipped) xDist = (xClip - a->x) / xd;
1561 if (yClipped) yDist = (yClip - a->y) / yd;
1562 if (zClipped) zDist = (zClip - a->z) / zd;
1563
1564 int face = 0;
1565 if (xDist < yDist && xDist < zDist)
1566 {
1567 if (xTile1 > xTile0) face = 4;
1568 else face = 5;
1569
1570 a->x = xClip;
1571 a->y += yd * xDist;
1572 a->z += zd * xDist;
1573 }
1574 else if (yDist < zDist)
1575 {
1576 if (yTile1 > yTile0) face = 0;
1577 else face = 1;
1578
1579 a->x += xd * yDist;
1580 a->y = yClip;
1581 a->z += zd * yDist;
1582 }
1583 else
1584 {
1585 if (zTile1 > zTile0) face = 2;
1586 else face = 3;
1587
1588 a->x += xd * zDist;
1589 a->y += yd * zDist;
1590 a->z = zClip;
1591 }
1592
1593 Vec3 *tPos = Vec3::newTemp(a->x, a->y, a->z);
1594 xTile0 = static_cast<int>(tPos->x = floor(a->x));
1595 if (face == 5)
1596 {
1597 xTile0--;
1598 tPos->x++;
1599 }
1600 yTile0 = static_cast<int>(tPos->y = floor(a->y));
1601 if (face == 1)
1602 {
1603 yTile0--;
1604 tPos->y++;
1605 }
1606 zTile0 = static_cast<int>(tPos->z = floor(a->z));
1607 if (face == 3)
1608 {
1609 zTile0--;
1610 tPos->z++;
1611 }
1612
1613 int t = getTile(xTile0, yTile0, zTile0);
1614 int data = getData(xTile0, yTile0, zTile0);
1615 Tile *tile = Tile::tiles[t];
1616 if (solidOnly && tile != nullptr && tile->getAABB(this, xTile0, yTile0, zTile0) == nullptr)
1617 {
1618 // No collision
1619
1620 }
1621 else if (t > 0 && tile->mayPick(data, liquid))
1622 {
1623 HitResult *r = tile->clip(this, xTile0, yTile0, zTile0, a, b);
1624 if (r != nullptr) return r;
1625 }
1626 }
1627 return nullptr;
1628}
1629
1630
1631void Level::playEntitySound(shared_ptr<Entity> entity, int iSound, float volume, float pitch)
1632{
1633 if(entity == nullptr) return;
1634 for (auto& listener : listeners)
1635 {
1636 // 4J-PB - if the entity is a local player, don't play the sound
1637 if(entity->GetType() == eTYPE_SERVERPLAYER)
1638 {
1639 //app.DebugPrintf("ENTITY is serverplayer\n");
1640
1641 listener->playSound(iSound, entity->x, entity->y - entity->heightOffset, entity->z, volume, pitch);
1642 }
1643 else
1644 {
1645 listener->playSound(iSound, entity->x, entity->y - entity->heightOffset, entity->z, volume, pitch);
1646 }
1647 }
1648}
1649
1650void Level::playPlayerSound(shared_ptr<Player> entity, int iSound, float volume, float pitch)
1651{
1652 if (entity == nullptr) return;
1653 for (auto& listener : listeners)
1654 {
1655 listener->playSoundExceptPlayer(entity, iSound, entity->x, entity->y - entity->heightOffset, entity->z, volume, pitch);
1656 }
1657}
1658
1659//void Level::playSound(double x, double y, double z, const wstring& name, float volume, float pitch)
1660void Level::playSound(double x, double y, double z, int iSound, float volume, float pitch, float fClipSoundDist)
1661{
1662 for (auto& listener : listeners)
1663 {
1664 listener->playSound(iSound, x, y, z, volume, pitch, fClipSoundDist);
1665 }
1666}
1667
1668void Level::playLocalSound(double x, double y, double z, int iSound, float volume, float pitch, bool distanceDelay, float fClipSoundDist)
1669{
1670}
1671
1672void Level::playStreamingMusic(const wstring& name, int x, int y, int z)
1673{
1674 for (auto& listener : listeners)
1675 {
1676 listener->playStreamingMusic(name, x, y, z);
1677 }
1678}
1679
1680
1681void Level::playMusic(double x, double y, double z, const wstring& string, float volume)
1682{
1683}
1684
1685// 4J-PB added
1686void Level::addParticle(ePARTICLE_TYPE id, double x, double y, double z, double xd, double yd, double zd)
1687{
1688 for (auto& listener : listeners)
1689 listener->addParticle(id, x, y, z, xd, yd, zd);
1690}
1691
1692bool Level::addGlobalEntity(shared_ptr<Entity> e)
1693{
1694 globalEntities.push_back(e);
1695 return true;
1696}
1697
1698#pragma optimize( "", off )
1699
1700bool Level::addEntity(shared_ptr<Entity> e)
1701{
1702 int xc = Mth::floor(e->x / 16);
1703 int zc = Mth::floor(e->z / 16);
1704
1705 if(e == nullptr)
1706 {
1707 return false;
1708 }
1709
1710 bool forced = e->forcedLoading;
1711 if (e->instanceof(eTYPE_PLAYER))
1712 {
1713 forced = true;
1714 }
1715
1716 if (forced || hasChunk(xc, zc))
1717 {
1718 if (e->instanceof(eTYPE_PLAYER))
1719 {
1720 shared_ptr<Player> player = dynamic_pointer_cast<Player>(e);
1721
1722 // 4J Stu - Added so we don't continually add the player to the players list while they are dead
1723 if( find( players.begin(), players.end(), e ) == players.end() )
1724 {
1725 players.push_back(player);
1726 }
1727
1728 updateSleepingPlayerList();
1729 }
1730 MemSect(42);
1731 getChunk(xc, zc)->addEntity(e);
1732 MemSect(0);
1733 EnterCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
1734 MemSect(43);
1735 entities.push_back(e);
1736 MemSect(0);
1737 LeaveCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
1738 MemSect(44);
1739 entityAdded(e);
1740 MemSect(0);
1741 return true;
1742 }
1743 return false;
1744}
1745
1746#pragma optimize( "", on )
1747
1748void Level::entityAdded(shared_ptr<Entity> e)
1749{
1750 for (auto& listener : listeners)
1751 {
1752 listener->entityAdded(e);
1753 }
1754}
1755
1756
1757void Level::entityRemoved(shared_ptr<Entity> e)
1758{
1759 for (auto& listener : listeners)
1760 {
1761 listener->entityRemoved(e);
1762 }
1763}
1764
1765// 4J added
1766void Level::playerRemoved(shared_ptr<Entity> e)
1767{
1768 for (auto& listener : listeners)
1769 {
1770 listener->playerRemoved(e);
1771 }
1772}
1773
1774void Level::removeEntity(shared_ptr<Entity> e)
1775{
1776 if (e->rider.lock())
1777 {
1778 e->rider.lock()->ride(nullptr);
1779 }
1780 if (e->riding)
1781 {
1782 e->ride(nullptr);
1783 }
1784 e->remove();
1785 if (e->instanceof(eTYPE_PLAYER))
1786 {
1787 auto it = players.begin();
1788 auto itEnd = players.end();
1789 while( it != itEnd && *it != dynamic_pointer_cast<Player>(e) )
1790 it++;
1791
1792 if( it != itEnd )
1793 {
1794 players.erase( it );
1795 }
1796
1797 updateSleepingPlayerList();
1798 playerRemoved(e); // 4J added - this will let the entity tracker know that we have actually removed the player from the level's player list
1799 }
1800}
1801
1802
1803void Level::removeEntityImmediately(shared_ptr<Entity> e)
1804{
1805 e->remove();
1806
1807 if (e->instanceof(eTYPE_PLAYER))
1808 {
1809 vector<shared_ptr<Player> >::iterator it = players.begin();
1810 vector<shared_ptr<Player> >::iterator itEnd = players.end();
1811 while( it != itEnd && *it != dynamic_pointer_cast<Player>(e) )
1812 it++;
1813
1814 if( it != itEnd )
1815 {
1816 players.erase( it );
1817 }
1818
1819 updateSleepingPlayerList();
1820 playerRemoved(e); // 4J added - this will let the entity tracker know that we have actually removed the player from the level's player list
1821 }
1822
1823 int xc = e->xChunk;
1824 int zc = e->zChunk;
1825 if (e->inChunk && hasChunk(xc, zc))
1826 {
1827 getChunk(xc, zc)->removeEntity(e);
1828 }
1829
1830 EnterCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
1831 vector<shared_ptr<Entity> >::iterator it = entities.begin();
1832 vector<shared_ptr<Entity> >::iterator endIt = entities.end();
1833 while( it != endIt && *it != e)
1834 it++;
1835
1836 if( it != endIt )
1837 {
1838 entities.erase( it );
1839 }
1840 LeaveCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
1841 entityRemoved(e);
1842}
1843
1844
1845void Level::addListener(LevelListener *listener)
1846{
1847 listeners.push_back(listener);
1848}
1849
1850
1851void Level::removeListener(LevelListener *listener)
1852{
1853 vector<LevelListener *>::iterator it = listeners.begin();
1854 vector<LevelListener *>::iterator itEnd = listeners.end();
1855 while( it != itEnd && *it != listener )
1856 it++;
1857
1858 if( it != itEnd )
1859 listeners.erase( it );
1860}
1861
1862
1863// 4J - added noEntities and blockAtEdge parameter
1864AABBList *Level::getCubes(shared_ptr<Entity> source, AABB *box, bool noEntities/* = false*/, bool blockAtEdge/* = false*/)
1865{
1866 boxes.clear();
1867 int x0 = Mth::floor(box->x0);
1868 int x1 = Mth::floor(box->x1 + 1);
1869 int y0 = Mth::floor(box->y0);
1870 int y1 = Mth::floor(box->y1 + 1);
1871 int z0 = Mth::floor(box->z0);
1872 int z1 = Mth::floor(box->z1 + 1);
1873
1874 int maxxz = ( dimension->getXZSize() * 16 ) / 2;
1875 int minxz = -maxxz;
1876 for (int x = x0; x < x1; x++)
1877 for (int z = z0; z < z1; z++)
1878 {
1879 // 4J - If we are outside the map, return solid AABBs (rock is a bit of an arbitrary choice here, just need a correct AABB)
1880 if( blockAtEdge && ( ( x < minxz ) || ( x >= maxxz ) || ( z < minxz ) || ( z >= maxxz ) ) )
1881 {
1882 for (int y = y0 - 1; y < y1; y++)
1883 {
1884 Tile::stone->addAABBs(this, x, y, z, box, &boxes, source);
1885 }
1886 }
1887 else
1888 {
1889 if (hasChunkAt(x, 64, z))
1890 {
1891 for (int y = y0 - 1; y < y1; y++)
1892 {
1893 Tile *tile = Tile::tiles[getTile(x, y, z)];
1894 if (tile != nullptr)
1895 {
1896 tile->addAABBs(this, x, y, z, box, &boxes, source);
1897 }
1898 }
1899 }
1900 }
1901 }
1902 // 4J - also stop player falling out of the bottom of the map if blockAtEdge is true. Again, rock is an arbitrary choice here
1903 // 4J Stu - Don't stop entities falling into the void while in The End (it has no bedrock)
1904 if( blockAtEdge && ( ( y0 - 1 ) < 0 ) && dimension->id != 1 )
1905 {
1906 for (int y = y0 - 1; y < 0; y++)
1907 {
1908 for (int x = x0; x < x1; x++)
1909 for (int z = z0; z < z1; z++)
1910 {
1911 Tile::stone->addAABBs(this, x, y, z, box, &boxes, source );
1912 }
1913 }
1914 }
1915 // 4J - final bounds check - limit vertical movement so we can't move above maxMovementHeight
1916 if( blockAtEdge && ( y1 > maxMovementHeight ) )
1917 {
1918 for (int y = maxMovementHeight; y < y1; y++)
1919 {
1920 for (int x = x0; x < x1; x++)
1921 for (int z = z0; z < z1; z++)
1922 {
1923 Tile::stone->addAABBs(this, x, y, z, box, &boxes, source );
1924 }
1925 }
1926 }
1927 // 4J - now add in collision for any blocks which have actually been removed, but haven't had their render data updated to reflect this yet. This is to stop the player
1928 // being able to move the view position inside a tile which is (visually) still there, and see out of the world. This is particularly a problem when moving upwards in
1929 // creative mode as the player can get very close to the edge of tiles whilst looking upwards and can therefore very quickly move inside one.
1930 Minecraft::GetInstance()->levelRenderer->destroyedTileManager->addAABBs( this, box, &boxes);
1931
1932 // 4J - added
1933 if( noEntities ) return &boxes;
1934
1935 double r = 0.25;
1936 vector<shared_ptr<Entity> > *ee = getEntities(source, box->grow(r, r, r));
1937 for (auto& it : *ee)
1938 {
1939 AABB *collideBox = it->getCollideBox();
1940 if (collideBox != nullptr && collideBox->intersects(box))
1941 {
1942 boxes.push_back(collideBox);
1943 }
1944
1945 collideBox = source->getCollideAgainstBox(it);
1946 if (collideBox != nullptr && collideBox->intersects(box))
1947 {
1948 boxes.push_back(collideBox);
1949 }
1950 }
1951
1952 return &boxes;
1953}
1954
1955// 4J Stu - Brought forward from 12w36 to fix #46282 - TU5: Gameplay: Exiting the minecart in a tight corridor damages the player
1956AABBList *Level::getTileCubes(AABB *box, bool blockAtEdge/* = false */)
1957{
1958 return getCubes(nullptr, box, true, blockAtEdge);
1959 //boxes.clear();
1960 //int x0 = Mth::floor(box->x0);
1961 //int x1 = Mth::floor(box->x1 + 1);
1962 //int y0 = Mth::floor(box->y0);
1963 //int y1 = Mth::floor(box->y1 + 1);
1964 //int z0 = Mth::floor(box->z0);
1965 //int z1 = Mth::floor(box->z1 + 1);
1966
1967 //for (int x = x0; x < x1; x++)
1968 //{
1969 // for (int z = z0; z < z1; z++)
1970 // {
1971 // if (hasChunkAt(x, 64, z))
1972 // {
1973 // for (int y = y0 - 1; y < y1; y++)
1974 // {
1975 // Tile *tile = Tile::tiles[getTile(x, y, z)];
1976
1977 // if (tile != nullptr)
1978 // {
1979 // tile->addAABBs(this, x, y, z, box, &boxes);
1980 // }
1981 // }
1982 // }
1983 // }
1984 //}
1985
1986 //return boxes;
1987}
1988
1989//4J - change brought forward from 1.8.2
1990int Level::getOldSkyDarken(float a)
1991{
1992 float td = getTimeOfDay(a);
1993
1994 float br = 1 - (Mth::cos(td * PI * 2) * 2 + 0.5f);
1995 if (br < 0.0f) br = 0.0f;
1996 if (br > 1.0f) br = 1.0f;
1997
1998 br = 1 - br;
1999
2000 br *= 1 - (getRainLevel(a) * 5 / 16.0f);
2001 br *= 1 - (getThunderLevel(a) * 5 / 16.0f);
2002 br = 1 - br;
2003 return static_cast<int>(br * 11);
2004}
2005
2006//4J - change brought forward from 1.8.2
2007float Level::getSkyDarken(float a)
2008{
2009 float td = getTimeOfDay(a);
2010
2011 float br = 1 - (Mth::cos(td * PI * 2) * 2 + 0.2f);
2012 if (br < 0.0f) br = 0.0f;
2013 if (br > 1.0f) br = 1.0f;
2014
2015 br = 1.0f - br;
2016
2017 br *= 1.0f - (getRainLevel(a) * 5.0f / 16.0f);
2018 br *= 1.0f - (getThunderLevel(a) * 5.0f / 16.0f);
2019 // return ((int) (br * 13));
2020
2021 return br * 0.8f + 0.2f;
2022}
2023
2024
2025
2026Vec3 *Level::getSkyColor(shared_ptr<Entity> source, float a)
2027{
2028 float td = getTimeOfDay(a);
2029
2030 float br = Mth::cos(td * PI * 2) * 2 + 0.5f;
2031 if (br < 0.0f) br = 0.0f;
2032 if (br > 1.0f) br = 1.0f;
2033
2034 int xx = Mth::floor(source->x);
2035 int zz = Mth::floor(source->z);
2036 Biome *biome = getBiome(xx, zz);
2037 float temp = biome->getTemperature();
2038 int skyColor = biome->getSkyColor(temp);
2039
2040 float r = ((skyColor >> 16) & 0xff) / 255.0f;
2041 float g = ((skyColor >> 8) & 0xff) / 255.0f;
2042 float b = ((skyColor) & 0xff) / 255.0f;
2043 r *= br;
2044 g *= br;
2045 b *= br;
2046
2047 float rainLevel = getRainLevel(a);
2048 if (rainLevel > 0)
2049 {
2050 float mid = (r * 0.30f + g * 0.59f + b * 0.11f) * 0.6f;
2051
2052 float ba = 1 - rainLevel * 0.75f;
2053 r = r * ba + mid * (1 - ba);
2054 g = g * ba + mid * (1 - ba);
2055 b = b * ba + mid * (1 - ba);
2056 }
2057 float thunderLevel = getThunderLevel(a);
2058 if (thunderLevel > 0)
2059 {
2060 float mid = (r * 0.30f + g * 0.59f + b * 0.11f) * 0.2f;
2061
2062 float ba = 1 - thunderLevel * 0.75f;
2063 r = r * ba + mid * (1 - ba);
2064 g = g * ba + mid * (1 - ba);
2065 b = b * ba + mid * (1 - ba);
2066 }
2067
2068 if (skyFlashTime > 0)
2069 {
2070 float f = (skyFlashTime - a);
2071 if (f > 1) f = 1;
2072 f = f * 0.45f;
2073 r = r * (1 - f) + 0.8f * f;
2074 g = g * (1 - f) + 0.8f * f;
2075 b = b * (1 - f) + 1 * f;
2076 }
2077
2078 return Vec3::newTemp(r, g, b);
2079}
2080
2081
2082float Level::getTimeOfDay(float a)
2083{
2084 /*
2085 * 4J-PB removed line below - notch committed 1.6.6 with the incorrect
2086 * getTimeOfDay and changed it before releasing (without
2087 * re-committing)... that should be the only difference // jeb
2088 */
2089 /* if (this != nullptr) return 0.5f; */
2090
2091 // 4J Added if so we can override timeOfDay without changing the time that affects ticking of things
2092 return dimension->getTimeOfDay(levelData->getDayTime(), a);;
2093}
2094
2095int Level::getMoonPhase()
2096{
2097 return dimension->getMoonPhase(levelData->getDayTime());
2098}
2099
2100float Level::getMoonBrightness()
2101{
2102 return Dimension::MOON_BRIGHTNESS_PER_PHASE[dimension->getMoonPhase(levelData->getDayTime())];
2103}
2104
2105float Level::getSunAngle(float a)
2106{
2107 float td = getTimeOfDay(a);
2108 return td * PI * 2;
2109}
2110
2111
2112Vec3 *Level::getCloudColor(float a)
2113{
2114 float td = getTimeOfDay(a);
2115
2116 float br = Mth::cos(td * PI * 2) * 2.0f + 0.5f;
2117 if (br < 0.0f) br = 0.0f;
2118 if (br > 1.0f) br = 1.0f;
2119
2120 int baseCloudColour = Minecraft::GetInstance()->getColourTable()->getColor( eMinecraftColour_In_Cloud_Base_Colour );
2121
2122 float r = ((baseCloudColour >> 16) & 0xff) / 255.0f;
2123 float g = ((baseCloudColour >> 8) & 0xff) / 255.0f;
2124 float b = ((baseCloudColour) & 0xff) / 255.0f;
2125
2126 float rainLevel = getRainLevel(a);
2127 if (rainLevel > 0)
2128 {
2129 float mid = (r * 0.30f + g * 0.59f + b * 0.11f) * 0.6f;
2130
2131 float ba = 1 - rainLevel * 0.95f;
2132 r = r * ba + mid * (1 - ba);
2133 g = g * ba + mid * (1 - ba);
2134 b = b * ba + mid * (1 - ba);
2135 }
2136
2137 r *= br * 0.90f + 0.10f;
2138 g *= br * 0.90f + 0.10f;
2139 b *= br * 0.85f + 0.15f;
2140
2141 float thunderLevel = getThunderLevel(a);
2142 if (thunderLevel > 0)
2143 {
2144 float mid = (r * 0.30f + g * 0.59f + b * 0.11f) * 0.2f;
2145
2146 float ba = 1 - thunderLevel * 0.95f;
2147 r = r * ba + mid * (1 - ba);
2148 g = g * ba + mid * (1 - ba);
2149 b = b * ba + mid * (1 - ba);
2150 }
2151
2152 return Vec3::newTemp(r, g, b);
2153}
2154
2155
2156Vec3 *Level::getFogColor(float a)
2157{
2158 float td = getTimeOfDay(a);
2159 return dimension->getFogColor(td, a);
2160}
2161
2162
2163int Level::getTopRainBlock(int x, int z)
2164{
2165 // 4J - optimisation brought forward from 1.8.2 - used to do full calculation here but result is now cached in LevelChunk
2166 return getChunkAt(x, z)->getTopRainBlock(x & 15, z & 15);
2167}
2168
2169// 4J added
2170bool Level::biomeHasRain(int x, int z)
2171{
2172 return getChunkAt(x, z)->biomeHasRain(x & 15, z & 15);
2173}
2174
2175// 4J added
2176bool Level::biomeHasSnow(int x, int z)
2177{
2178 return getChunkAt(x, z)->biomeHasSnow(x & 15, z & 15);
2179}
2180
2181int Level::getTopSolidBlock(int x, int z)
2182{
2183 LevelChunk *levelChunk = getChunkAt(x, z);
2184
2185 int y = levelChunk->getHighestSectionPosition() + 15;
2186
2187 x &= 15;
2188 z &= 15;
2189
2190 while (y > 0)
2191 {
2192 int t = levelChunk->getTile(x, y, z);
2193 if (t == 0 || !(Tile::tiles[t]->material->blocksMotion()) || Tile::tiles[t]->material == Material::leaves)
2194 {
2195 y--;
2196 }
2197 else
2198 {
2199 return y + 1;
2200 }
2201 }
2202 return -1;
2203}
2204
2205
2206int Level::getLightDepth(int x, int z)
2207{
2208 return getChunkAt(x, z)->getHeightmap(x & 15, z & 15);
2209}
2210
2211
2212float Level::getStarBrightness(float a)
2213{
2214 float td = getTimeOfDay(a);
2215
2216 float br = 1 - (Mth::cos(td * PI * 2) * 2 + 0.25f);
2217 if (br < 0.0f) br = 0.0f;
2218 if (br > 1.0f) br = 1.0f;
2219
2220 return br * br * 0.5f;
2221}
2222
2223void Level::addToTickNextTick(int x, int y, int z, int tileId, int tickDelay)
2224{
2225}
2226
2227void Level::addToTickNextTick(int x, int y, int z, int tileId, int tickDelay, int priorityTilt)
2228{
2229}
2230
2231void Level::forceAddTileTick(int x, int y, int z, int tileId, int tickDelay, int prioTilt)
2232{
2233}
2234
2235void Level::tickEntities()
2236{
2237 vector<shared_ptr<Entity> >::iterator itGE = globalEntities.begin();
2238 while( itGE != globalEntities.end() )
2239 {
2240 shared_ptr<Entity> e = *itGE;
2241 e->tickCount++;
2242 e->tick();
2243 if (e->removed)
2244 {
2245 itGE = globalEntities.erase( itGE );
2246 }
2247 else
2248 {
2249 itGE++;
2250 }
2251 }
2252
2253 EnterCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
2254
2255 for (auto it = entities.begin(); it != entities.end();)
2256 {
2257 bool found = false;
2258 for(auto& it2 : entitiesToRemove)
2259 {
2260 if( (*it) == it2 )
2261 {
2262 found = true;
2263 break;
2264 }
2265 }
2266 if( found )
2267 {
2268 it = entities.erase(it);
2269 }
2270 else
2271 {
2272 it++;
2273 }
2274 }
2275 LeaveCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
2276
2277 for (auto& e : entitiesToRemove)
2278 {
2279 int xc = e->xChunk;
2280 int zc = e->zChunk;
2281 if (e->inChunk && hasChunk(xc, zc))
2282 {
2283 getChunk(xc, zc)->removeEntity(e);
2284 }
2285 }
2286
2287 for (auto& it : entitiesToRemove)
2288 {
2289 entityRemoved(it);
2290 }
2291 //
2292 entitiesToRemove.clear();
2293
2294 //for (int i = 0; i < entities.size(); i++)
2295
2296 /* 4J Jev, using an iterator causes problems here as
2297 * the vector is modified from inside this loop.
2298 */
2299 EnterCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
2300
2301 for (unsigned int i = 0; i < entities.size(); )
2302 {
2303 shared_ptr<Entity> e = entities.at(i);
2304
2305 if (e->riding != nullptr)
2306 {
2307 if (e->riding->removed || e->riding->rider.lock() != e)
2308 {
2309 e->riding->rider = weak_ptr<Entity>();
2310 e->riding = nullptr;
2311 }
2312 else
2313 {
2314 i++;
2315 continue;
2316 }
2317 }
2318
2319 if (!e->removed)
2320 {
2321#ifndef _FINAL_BUILD
2322 if ( !( app.DebugSettingsOn() && app.GetMobsDontTickEnabled() && e->instanceof(eTYPE_MOB) && !e->instanceof(eTYPE_PLAYER)) )
2323#endif
2324 {
2325 tick(e);
2326 }
2327 }
2328
2329 if (e->removed)
2330 {
2331 int xc = e->xChunk;
2332 int zc = e->zChunk;
2333 if (e->inChunk && hasChunk(xc, zc))
2334 {
2335 getChunk(xc, zc)->removeEntity(e);
2336 }
2337 //entities.remove(i--);
2338 //itE = entities.erase( itE );
2339
2340 // 4J Find the entity again before deleting, as things might have moved in the entity array eg
2341 // from the explosion created by tnt
2342 auto it = find(entities.begin(), entities.end(), e);
2343 if( it != entities.end() )
2344 {
2345 entities.erase(it);
2346 }
2347
2348 entityRemoved(e);
2349 }
2350 else
2351 {
2352 i++;
2353 }
2354 }
2355 LeaveCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
2356
2357 EnterCriticalSection(&m_tileEntityListCS);
2358
2359 updatingTileEntities = true;
2360 for (auto it = tileEntityList.begin(); it != tileEntityList.end();)
2361 {
2362 shared_ptr<TileEntity> te = *it;//tilevector<shared_ptr<Entity> >.at(i);
2363 if( !te->isRemoved() && te->hasLevel() )
2364 {
2365 if (hasChunkAt(te->x, te->y, te->z))
2366 {
2367#ifdef _LARGE_WORLDS
2368 LevelChunk *lc = getChunk(te->x >> 4, te->z >> 4);
2369 if(!isClientSide || !lc->isUnloaded())
2370#endif
2371 {
2372 te->tick();
2373 }
2374 }
2375 }
2376
2377 if( te->isRemoved() )
2378 {
2379 it = tileEntityList.erase(it);
2380 if (hasChunk(te->x >> 4, te->z >> 4))
2381 {
2382 LevelChunk *lc = getChunk(te->x >> 4, te->z >> 4);
2383 if (lc != nullptr) lc->removeTileEntity(te->x & 15, te->y, te->z & 15);
2384 }
2385 }
2386 else
2387 {
2388 it++;
2389 }
2390 }
2391 updatingTileEntities = false;
2392
2393 // 4J-PB - Stuart - check this is correct here
2394
2395 if (!tileEntitiesToUnload.empty())
2396 {
2397 //tileEntityList.removeAll(tileEntitiesToUnload);
2398
2399 for (auto it = tileEntityList.begin(); it != tileEntityList.end();)
2400 {
2401 bool found = false;
2402 for(auto& it2 : tileEntitiesToUnload)
2403 {
2404 if( (*it) == it2 )
2405 {
2406 found = true;
2407 break;
2408 }
2409 }
2410 if( found )
2411 {
2412 if(isClientSide)
2413 {
2414 __debugbreak();
2415 }
2416 it = tileEntityList.erase(it);
2417 }
2418 else
2419 {
2420 it++;
2421 }
2422 }
2423 tileEntitiesToUnload.clear();
2424 }
2425
2426 if( !pendingTileEntities.empty() )
2427 {
2428 for(auto& e : pendingTileEntities)
2429 {
2430 if( e && !e->isRemoved() )
2431 {
2432 if( find(tileEntityList.begin(),tileEntityList.end(),e) == tileEntityList.end() )
2433 {
2434 tileEntityList.push_back(e);
2435 }
2436 if (hasChunk(e->x >> 4, e->z >> 4))
2437 {
2438 LevelChunk *lc = getChunk(e->x >> 4, e->z >> 4);
2439 if (lc != nullptr) lc->setTileEntity(e->x & 15, e->y, e->z & 15, e);
2440 }
2441
2442 sendTileUpdated(e->x, e->y, e->z);
2443 }
2444 }
2445 pendingTileEntities.clear();
2446 }
2447 LeaveCriticalSection(&m_tileEntityListCS);
2448}
2449
2450void Level::addAllPendingTileEntities(vector< shared_ptr<TileEntity> >& entities)
2451{
2452 EnterCriticalSection(&m_tileEntityListCS);
2453 if( updatingTileEntities )
2454 {
2455 for(auto& it : entities)
2456 {
2457 pendingTileEntities.push_back(it);
2458 }
2459 }
2460 else
2461 {
2462 for(auto& it : entities)
2463 {
2464 tileEntityList.push_back(it);
2465 }
2466 }
2467 LeaveCriticalSection(&m_tileEntityListCS);
2468}
2469
2470void Level::tick(shared_ptr<Entity> e)
2471{
2472 tick(e, true);
2473}
2474
2475
2476void Level::tick(shared_ptr<Entity> e, bool actual)
2477{
2478 int xc = Mth::floor(e->x);
2479 int zc = Mth::floor(e->z);
2480 int r = 32;
2481#ifdef __PSVITA__
2482 // AP - make sure the dragon ticks all the time, even when there aren't any chunks.
2483 if (actual && e->GetType() != eTYPE_ENDERDRAGON && !hasChunksAt(xc - r, 0, zc - r, xc + r, 0, zc + r))
2484#else
2485 if (actual && !hasChunksAt(xc - r, 0, zc - r, xc + r, 0, zc + r))
2486#endif
2487 {
2488 return;
2489 }
2490
2491 e->xOld = e->x;
2492 e->yOld = e->y;
2493 e->zOld = e->z;
2494 e->yRotO = e->yRot;
2495 e->xRotO = e->xRot;
2496
2497#ifdef __PSVITA__
2498 // AP - make sure the dragon ticks all the time, even when there aren't any chunks.
2499 if (actual && (e->GetType() == eTYPE_ENDERDRAGON || e->inChunk) )
2500#else
2501 if (actual && e->inChunk )
2502#endif
2503 {
2504 e->tickCount++;
2505 if (e->riding != nullptr)
2506 {
2507 e->rideTick();
2508 }
2509 else
2510 {
2511 e->tick();
2512 }
2513 }
2514
2515 // SANTITY!!
2516 if (Double::isNaN(e->x) || Double::isInfinite(e->x)) e->x = e->xOld;
2517 if (Double::isNaN(e->y) || Double::isInfinite(e->y)) e->y = e->yOld;
2518 if (Double::isNaN(e->z) || Double::isInfinite(e->z)) e->z = e->zOld;
2519 if (Double::isNaN(e->xRot) || Double::isInfinite(e->xRot)) e->xRot = e->xRotO;
2520 if (Double::isNaN(e->yRot) || Double::isInfinite(e->yRot)) e->yRot = e->yRotO;
2521
2522 int xcn = Mth::floor(e->x / 16);
2523 int ycn = Mth::floor(e->y / 16);
2524 int zcn = Mth::floor(e->z / 16);
2525
2526
2527
2528 if (!e->inChunk || (e->xChunk != xcn || e->yChunk != ycn || e->zChunk != zcn))
2529 {
2530 if (e->inChunk && hasChunk(e->xChunk, e->zChunk))
2531 {
2532 getChunk(e->xChunk, e->zChunk)->removeEntity(e, e->yChunk);
2533 }
2534
2535 if (hasChunk(xcn, zcn))
2536 {
2537
2538 e->inChunk = true;
2539 MemSect(39);
2540 getChunk(xcn, zcn)->addEntity(e);
2541 MemSect(0);
2542 }
2543 else
2544 {
2545 e->inChunk = false;
2546 // e.remove();
2547 }
2548 }
2549
2550 if (actual && e->inChunk)
2551 {
2552 if (e->rider.lock() != nullptr)
2553 {
2554 if (e->rider.lock()->removed || e->rider.lock()->riding != e)
2555 {
2556 e->rider.lock()->riding = nullptr;
2557 e->rider = weak_ptr<Entity>();
2558 }
2559 else
2560 {
2561 tick(e->rider.lock());
2562 }
2563 }
2564 }
2565}
2566
2567
2568bool Level::isUnobstructed(AABB *aabb)
2569{
2570 return isUnobstructed(aabb, nullptr);
2571}
2572
2573bool Level::isUnobstructed(AABB *aabb, shared_ptr<Entity> ignore)
2574{
2575 vector<shared_ptr<Entity> > *ents = getEntities(nullptr, aabb);
2576 for (auto& e : *ents)
2577 {
2578 if (e && !e->removed && e->blocksBuilding && e != ignore) return false;
2579 }
2580 return true;
2581}
2582
2583
2584bool Level::containsAnyBlocks(AABB *box)
2585{
2586 int x0 = Mth::floor(box->x0);
2587 int x1 = Mth::floor(box->x1 + 1);
2588 int y0 = Mth::floor(box->y0);
2589 int y1 = Mth::floor(box->y1 + 1);
2590 int z0 = Mth::floor(box->z0);
2591 int z1 = Mth::floor(box->z1 + 1);
2592
2593 if (box->x0 < 0) x0--;
2594 if (box->y0 < 0) y0--;
2595 if (box->z0 < 0) z0--;
2596
2597 for (int x = x0; x < x1; x++)
2598 for (int y = y0; y < y1; y++)
2599 for (int z = z0; z < z1; z++)
2600 {
2601 Tile *tile = Tile::tiles[getTile(x, y, z)];
2602 if (tile != nullptr)
2603 {
2604 return true;
2605 }
2606 }
2607 return false;
2608}
2609
2610
2611bool Level::containsAnyLiquid(AABB *box)
2612{
2613 int x0 = Mth::floor(box->x0);
2614 int x1 = Mth::floor(box->x1 + 1);
2615 int y0 = Mth::floor(box->y0);
2616 int y1 = Mth::floor(box->y1 + 1);
2617 int z0 = Mth::floor(box->z0);
2618 int z1 = Mth::floor(box->z1 + 1);
2619
2620 if (box->x0 < 0) x0--;
2621 if (box->y0 < 0) y0--;
2622 if (box->z0 < 0) z0--;
2623
2624 for (int x = x0; x < x1; x++)
2625 for (int y = y0; y < y1; y++)
2626 for (int z = z0; z < z1; z++)
2627 {
2628 Tile *tile = Tile::tiles[getTile(x, y, z)];
2629 if (tile != nullptr && tile->material->isLiquid())
2630 {
2631 return true;
2632 }
2633 }
2634 return false;
2635}
2636
2637// 4J - added this to be used during mob spawning, and it returns true if there's any liquid in the bounding box, or might be because
2638// we don't have a loaded chunk that we'd need to determine whether it really did. The overall aim is to not load or create any chunk
2639// we haven't already got, and be cautious about placing the mob's.
2640bool Level::containsAnyLiquid_NoLoad(AABB *box)
2641{
2642 int x0 = Mth::floor(box->x0);
2643 int x1 = Mth::floor(box->x1 + 1);
2644 int y0 = Mth::floor(box->y0);
2645 int y1 = Mth::floor(box->y1 + 1);
2646 int z0 = Mth::floor(box->z0);
2647 int z1 = Mth::floor(box->z1 + 1);
2648
2649 if (box->x0 < 0) x0--;
2650 if (box->y0 < 0) y0--;
2651 if (box->z0 < 0) z0--;
2652
2653 for (int x = x0; x < x1; x++)
2654 for (int y = y0; y < y1; y++)
2655 for (int z = z0; z < z1; z++)
2656 {
2657 if( !hasChunkAt(x,y,z) ) return true; // If we don't have it, it might be liquid...
2658 Tile *tile = Tile::tiles[getTile(x, y, z)];
2659 if (tile != nullptr && tile->material->isLiquid())
2660 {
2661 return true;
2662 }
2663 }
2664 return false;
2665}
2666
2667
2668bool Level::containsFireTile(AABB *box)
2669{
2670 int x0 = Mth::floor(box->x0);
2671 int x1 = Mth::floor(box->x1 + 1);
2672 int y0 = Mth::floor(box->y0);
2673 int y1 = Mth::floor(box->y1 + 1);
2674 int z0 = Mth::floor(box->z0);
2675 int z1 = Mth::floor(box->z1 + 1);
2676
2677 if (hasChunksAt(x0, y0, z0, x1, y1, z1))
2678 {
2679 for (int x = x0; x < x1; x++)
2680 for (int y = y0; y < y1; y++)
2681 for (int z = z0; z < z1; z++)
2682 {
2683 int t = getTile(x, y, z);
2684
2685 if (t == Tile::fire_Id || t == Tile::lava_Id || t == Tile::calmLava_Id) return true;
2686 }
2687 }
2688 return false;
2689}
2690
2691
2692bool Level::checkAndHandleWater(AABB *box, Material *material, shared_ptr<Entity> e)
2693{
2694 int x0 = Mth::floor(box->x0);
2695 int x1 = Mth::floor(box->x1 + 1);
2696
2697 int y0 = Mth::floor(box->y0);
2698 int y1 = Mth::floor(box->y1 + 1);
2699
2700 int z0 = Mth::floor(box->z0);
2701 int z1 = Mth::floor(box->z1 + 1);
2702
2703 if (!hasChunksAt(x0, y0, z0, x1, y1, z1))
2704 {
2705 return false;
2706 }
2707
2708 bool ok = false;
2709 Vec3 *current = Vec3::newTemp(0, 0, 0);
2710 for (int x = x0; x < x1; x++)
2711 {
2712 for (int y = y0; y < y1; y++)
2713 {
2714 for (int z = z0; z < z1; z++)
2715 {
2716 Tile *tile = Tile::tiles[getTile(x, y, z)];
2717 if (tile != nullptr && tile->material == material)
2718 {
2719 double yt0 = y + 1 - LiquidTile::getHeight(getData(x, y, z));
2720 if (y1 >= yt0)
2721 {
2722 ok = true;
2723 tile->handleEntityInside(this, x, y, z, e, current);
2724 }
2725 }
2726 }
2727 }
2728 }
2729 if (current->length() > 0 && e->isPushedByWater())
2730 {
2731 current = current->normalize();
2732 double pow = 0.014;
2733 e->xd += current->x * pow;
2734 e->yd += current->y * pow;
2735 e->zd += current->z * pow;
2736 }
2737 return ok;
2738}
2739
2740
2741bool Level::containsMaterial(AABB *box, Material *material)
2742{
2743 int x0 = Mth::floor(box->x0);
2744 int x1 = Mth::floor(box->x1 + 1);
2745 int y0 = Mth::floor(box->y0);
2746 int y1 = Mth::floor(box->y1 + 1);
2747 int z0 = Mth::floor(box->z0);
2748 int z1 = Mth::floor(box->z1 + 1);
2749
2750 for (int x = x0; x < x1; x++)
2751 {
2752 for (int y = y0; y < y1; y++)
2753 {
2754 for (int z = z0; z < z1; z++)
2755 {
2756 Tile *tile = Tile::tiles[getTile(x, y, z)];
2757 if (tile != nullptr && tile->material == material)
2758 {
2759 return true;
2760 }
2761 }
2762 }
2763 }
2764 return false;
2765}
2766
2767
2768bool Level::containsLiquid(AABB *box, Material *material)
2769{
2770 int x0 = Mth::floor(box->x0);
2771 int x1 = Mth::floor(box->x1 + 1);
2772 int y0 = Mth::floor(box->y0);
2773 int y1 = Mth::floor(box->y1 + 1);
2774 int z0 = Mth::floor(box->z0);
2775 int z1 = Mth::floor(box->z1 + 1);
2776
2777 for (int x = x0; x < x1; x++)
2778 {
2779 for (int y = y0; y < y1; y++)
2780 {
2781 for (int z = z0; z < z1; z++)
2782 {
2783 Tile *tile = Tile::tiles[getTile(x, y, z)];
2784 if (tile != nullptr && tile->material == material)
2785 {
2786 int data = getData(x, y, z);
2787 double yh1 = y + 1;
2788 if (data < 8)
2789 {
2790 yh1 = y + 1 - data / 8.0;
2791 }
2792 if (yh1 >= box->y0)
2793 {
2794 return true;
2795 }
2796 }
2797 }
2798 }
2799 }
2800 return false;
2801}
2802
2803
2804shared_ptr<Explosion> Level::explode(shared_ptr<Entity> source, double x, double y, double z, float r, bool destroyBlocks)
2805{
2806 return explode(source, x, y, z, r, false, destroyBlocks);
2807}
2808
2809
2810shared_ptr<Explosion> Level::explode(shared_ptr<Entity> source, double x, double y, double z, float r, bool fire, bool destroyBlocks)
2811{
2812 shared_ptr<Explosion> explosion = std::make_shared<Explosion>(this, source, x, y, z, r);
2813 explosion->fire = fire;
2814 explosion->destroyBlocks = destroyBlocks;
2815 explosion->explode();
2816 explosion->finalizeExplosion(true);
2817 return explosion;
2818}
2819
2820
2821float Level::getSeenPercent(Vec3 *center, AABB *bb)
2822{
2823 double xs = 1.0 / ((bb->x1 - bb->x0) * 2 + 1);
2824 double ys = 1.0 / ((bb->y1 - bb->y0) * 2 + 1);
2825 double zs = 1.0 / ((bb->z1 - bb->z0) * 2 + 1);
2826 int hits = 0;
2827 int count = 0;
2828 for (double xx = 0; xx <= 1; xx += xs) // 4J Stu - xx, yy and zz were floats, made them doubles to remove warnings
2829 for (double yy = 0; yy <= 1; yy += ys)
2830 for (double zz = 0; zz <= 1; zz += zs)
2831 {
2832 double x = bb->x0 + (bb->x1 - bb->x0) * xx;
2833 double y = bb->y0 + (bb->y1 - bb->y0) * yy;
2834 double z = bb->z0 + (bb->z1 - bb->z0) * zz;
2835 HitResult *res = clip(Vec3::newTemp(x, y, z), center);
2836 if ( res == nullptr) hits++;
2837 delete res;
2838 count++;
2839 }
2840
2841 return hits / static_cast<float>(count);
2842}
2843
2844
2845bool Level::extinguishFire(shared_ptr<Player> player, int x, int y, int z, int face)
2846{
2847 if (face == 0) y--;
2848 if (face == 1) y++;
2849 if (face == 2) z--;
2850 if (face == 3) z++;
2851 if (face == 4) x--;
2852 if (face == 5) x++;
2853
2854 if (getTile(x, y, z) == Tile::fire_Id)
2855 {
2856 levelEvent(player, LevelEvent::SOUND_FIZZ, x, y, z, 0);
2857 removeTile(x, y, z);
2858 return true;
2859 }
2860 return false;
2861}
2862
2863/*
2864shared_ptr<Entity> Level::findSubclassOf(Entity::Class *entityClass)
2865{
2866return shared_ptr<Entity>();
2867}
2868*/
2869
2870
2871wstring Level::gatherStats()
