2872{
2873 wchar_t buf[64];
2874 EnterCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
2875 swprintf(buf,64,L"All:%d",entities.size());
2876 LeaveCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
2877 return wstring(buf);
2878}
2879
2880
2881wstring Level::gatherChunkSourceStats()
2882{
2883 return chunkSource->gatherStats();
2884}
2885
2886
2887shared_ptr<TileEntity> Level::getTileEntity(int x, int y, int z)
2888{
2889 if (y < minBuildHeight || y >= maxBuildHeight)
2890 {
2891 return nullptr;
2892 }
2893 shared_ptr<TileEntity> tileEntity = nullptr;
2894
2895 if (updatingTileEntities)
2896 {
2897 EnterCriticalSection(&m_tileEntityListCS);
2898 for (size_t i = 0; i < pendingTileEntities.size(); i++)
2899 {
2900 shared_ptr<TileEntity> e = pendingTileEntities.at(i);
2901 if (!e->isRemoved() && e->x == x && e->y == y && e->z == z)
2902 {
2903 tileEntity = e;
2904 break;
2905 }
2906 }
2907 LeaveCriticalSection(&m_tileEntityListCS);
2908 }
2909
2910 if (tileEntity == nullptr)
2911 {
2912 LevelChunk *lc = getChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4);
2913 if (lc != nullptr)
2914 {
2915 tileEntity = lc->getTileEntity(x & 15, y, z & 15);
2916 }
2917 }
2918
2919 if (tileEntity == nullptr)
2920 {
2921 EnterCriticalSection(&m_tileEntityListCS);
2922 for(auto& e : pendingTileEntities)
2923 {
2924 if ( e && !e->isRemoved() && e->x == x && e->y == y && e->z == z)
2925 {
2926 tileEntity = e;
2927 break;
2928 }
2929 }
2930 LeaveCriticalSection(&m_tileEntityListCS);
2931 }
2932 return tileEntity;
2933}
2934
2935
2936void Level::setTileEntity(int x, int y, int z, shared_ptr<TileEntity> tileEntity)
2937{
2938 if (tileEntity != nullptr && !tileEntity->isRemoved())
2939 {
2940 EnterCriticalSection(&m_tileEntityListCS);
2941 if (updatingTileEntities)
2942 {
2943 tileEntity->x = x;
2944 tileEntity->y = y;
2945 tileEntity->z = z;
2946
2947 // avoid adding duplicates
2948 for (auto it = pendingTileEntities.begin(); it != pendingTileEntities.end();)
2949 {
2950 shared_ptr<TileEntity> next = *it;
2951 if (next->x == x && next->y == y && next->z == z)
2952 {
2953 next->setRemoved();
2954 it = pendingTileEntities.erase(it);
2955 }
2956 else
2957 {
2958 ++it;
2959 }
2960 }
2961
2962 pendingTileEntities.push_back(tileEntity);
2963 }
2964 else
2965 {
2966 tileEntityList.push_back(tileEntity);
2967
2968 LevelChunk *lc = getChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4);
2969 if (lc != nullptr) lc->setTileEntity(x & 15, y, z & 15, tileEntity);
2970 }
2971 LeaveCriticalSection(&m_tileEntityListCS);
2972 }
2973}
2974
2975void Level::removeTileEntity(int x, int y, int z)
2976{
2977 EnterCriticalSection(&m_tileEntityListCS);
2978 shared_ptr<TileEntity> te = getTileEntity(x, y, z);
2979 if (te != nullptr && updatingTileEntities)
2980 {
2981 te->setRemoved();
2982 auto it = find(pendingTileEntities.begin(), pendingTileEntities.end(), te);
2983 if( it != pendingTileEntities.end() )
2984 {
2985 pendingTileEntities.erase(it);
2986 }
2987 }
2988 else
2989 {
2990 if (te != nullptr)
2991 {
2992 auto it = find(pendingTileEntities.begin(), pendingTileEntities.end(), te);
2993 if( it != pendingTileEntities.end() )
2994 {
2995 pendingTileEntities.erase(it);
2996 }
2997 auto it2 = find(tileEntityList.begin(), tileEntityList.end(), te);
2998 if( it2 != tileEntityList.end() )
2999 {
3000 tileEntityList.erase(it2);
3001 }
3002 }
3003 LevelChunk *lc = getChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4);
3004 if (lc != nullptr) lc->removeTileEntity(x & 15, y, z & 15);
3005 }
3006 LeaveCriticalSection(&m_tileEntityListCS);
3007}
3008
3009void Level::markForRemoval(shared_ptr<TileEntity> entity)
3010{
3011 tileEntitiesToUnload.push_back(entity);
3012}
3013
3014bool Level::isSolidRenderTile(int x, int y, int z)
3015{
3016 Tile *tile = Tile::tiles[getTile(x, y, z)];
3017 if (tile == nullptr) return false;
3018
3019 // 4J - addition here to make rendering big blocks of leaves more efficient. Normally leaves never consider themselves as solid, so
3020 // blocks of leaves will have all sides of each block completely visible. Changing to consider as solid if this block is surrounded by
3021 // other leaves (or solid things). This is paired with another change in Tile::getTexture which makes such solid tiles actually visibly solid (these
3022 // textures exist already for non-fancy graphics). Note: this tile-specific code is here rather than making some new virtual method in the tiles,
3023 // for the sake of efficiency - I don't imagine we'll be doing much more of this sort of thing
3024
3025 if( tile->id == Tile::leaves_Id )
3026 {
3027 int axo[6] = { 1,-1, 0, 0, 0, 0};
3028 int ayo[6] = { 0, 0, 1,-1, 0, 0};
3029 int azo[6] = { 0, 0, 0, 0, 1,-1};
3030 for( int i = 0; i < 6; i++ )
3031 {
3032 int t = getTile(x + axo[i], y + ayo[i] , z + azo[i]);
3033 if( ( t != Tile::leaves_Id ) && ( ( Tile::tiles[t] == nullptr ) || !Tile::tiles[t]->isSolidRender() ) )
3034 {
3035 return false;
3036 }
3037 }
3038
3039 return true;
3040 }
3041 return tile->isSolidRender(!isClientSide);
3042}
3043
3044
3045bool Level::isSolidBlockingTile(int x, int y, int z)
3046{
3047 return Tile::isSolidBlockingTile(getTile(x, y, z));
3048}
3049
3056bool Level::isSolidBlockingTileInLoadedChunk(int x, int y, int z, bool valueIfNotLoaded)
3057{
3058 if (x < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z < -MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || x >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE || z >= MAX_LEVEL_SIZE)
3059 {
3060 return valueIfNotLoaded;
3061 }
3062 LevelChunk *chunk = chunkSource->getChunk(x >> 4, z >> 4);
3063 if (chunk == nullptr || chunk->isEmpty())
3064 {
3065 return valueIfNotLoaded;
3066 }
3067
3068 Tile *tile = Tile::tiles[getTile(x, y, z)];
3069 if (tile == nullptr) return false;
3070 return tile->material->isSolidBlocking() && tile->isCubeShaped();
3071}
3072
3073bool Level::isFullAABBTile(int x, int y, int z)
3074{
3075 int tile = getTile(x, y, z);
3076 if (tile == 0 || Tile::tiles[tile] == nullptr)
3077 {
3078 return false;
3079 }
3080 AABB *aabb = Tile::tiles[tile]->getAABB(this, x, y, z);
3081 return aabb != nullptr && aabb->getSize() >= 1;
3082}
3083
3084bool Level::isTopSolidBlocking(int x, int y, int z)
3085{
3086 // Temporary workaround until tahgs per-face solidity is finished
3087 Tile *tile = Tile::tiles[getTile(x, y, z)];
3088 return isTopSolidBlocking(tile, getData(x, y, z));
3089}
3090
3091bool Level::isTopSolidBlocking(Tile *tile, int data)
3092{
3093 if (tile == nullptr) return false;
3094
3095 if (tile->material->isSolidBlocking() && tile->isCubeShaped()) return true;
3096 if (dynamic_cast<StairTile *>(tile) != nullptr)
3097 {
3098 return (data & StairTile::UPSIDEDOWN_BIT) == StairTile::UPSIDEDOWN_BIT;
3099 }
3100 if (dynamic_cast<HalfSlabTile *>(tile) != nullptr)
3101 {
3102 return (data & HalfSlabTile::TOP_SLOT_BIT) == HalfSlabTile::TOP_SLOT_BIT;
3103 }
3104 if (dynamic_cast<HopperTile *>(tile) != nullptr) return true;
3105 if (dynamic_cast<TopSnowTile *>(tile) != nullptr) return (data & TopSnowTile::HEIGHT_MASK) == TopSnowTile::MAX_HEIGHT + 1;
3106 return false;
3107}
3108
3109void Level::updateSkyBrightness()
3110{
3111 int newDark = getOldSkyDarken(1);
3112 if (newDark != skyDarken)
3113 {
3114 skyDarken = newDark;
3115 }
3116}
3117
3118void Level::setSpawnSettings(bool spawnEnemies, bool spawnFriendlies)
3119{
3120 this->spawnEnemies = spawnEnemies;
3121 this->spawnFriendlies = spawnFriendlies;
3122}
3123
3124void Level::tick()
3125{
3126 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"Weather tick");
3127 tickWeather();
3128 PIXEndNamedEvent();
3129}
3130
3131void Level::prepareWeather()
3132{
3133 if (levelData->isRaining())
3134 {
3135 rainLevel = 1;
3136 if (levelData->isThundering())
3137 {
3138 thunderLevel = 1;
3139 }
3140 }
3141}
3142
3143
3144void Level::tickWeather()
3145{
3146 if (dimension->hasCeiling) return;
3147
3148#ifndef _FINAL_BUILD
3149 // debug setting added to disable weather
3150 if(app.DebugSettingsOn())
3151 {
3152 if(app.GetGameSettingsDebugMask(ProfileManager.GetPrimaryPad())&(1L<<eDebugSetting_DisableWeather))
3153 {
3154 levelData->setThundering(false);
3155 levelData->setThunderTime(random->nextInt(TICKS_PER_DAY * 7) + TICKS_PER_DAY / 2);
3156 levelData->setRaining(false);
3157 levelData->setRainTime(random->nextInt(TICKS_PER_DAY * 7) + TICKS_PER_DAY / 2);
3158 }
3159 }
3160#endif
3161
3162 int thunderTime = levelData->getThunderTime();
3163 if (thunderTime <= 0)
3164 {
3165 if (levelData->isThundering())
3166 {
3167 levelData->setThunderTime(random->nextInt(20 * 60 * 10) + 20 * 60 * 3);
3168 }
3169 else
3170 {
3171 levelData->setThunderTime(random->nextInt(TICKS_PER_DAY * 7) + TICKS_PER_DAY / 2);
3172 }
3173 }
3174 else
3175 {
3176 thunderTime--;
3177 levelData->setThunderTime(thunderTime);
3178 if (thunderTime <= 0)
3179 {
3180 levelData->setThundering(!levelData->isThundering());
3181 }
3182 }
3183
3184 int rainTime = levelData->getRainTime();
3185 if (rainTime <= 0)
3186 {
3187 if (levelData->isRaining())
3188 {
3189 levelData->setRainTime(random->nextInt(TICKS_PER_DAY / 2) + TICKS_PER_DAY / 2);
3190 }
3191 else
3192 {
3193 levelData->setRainTime(random->nextInt(TICKS_PER_DAY * 7) + TICKS_PER_DAY / 2);
3194 }
3195 }
3196 else
3197 {
3198 rainTime--;
3199 levelData->setRainTime(rainTime);
3200 if (rainTime <= 0)
3201 {
3202 levelData->setRaining(!levelData->isRaining());
3203 }
3204 /* if( !levelData->isRaining() )
3205 {
3206 levelData->setRaining(true);
3207 }*/
3208 }
3209
3210 oRainLevel = rainLevel;
3211 if (levelData->isRaining())
3212 {
3213 rainLevel += 0.01;
3214 }
3215 else
3216 {
3217 rainLevel -= 0.01;
3218 }
3219 if (rainLevel < 0) rainLevel = 0;
3220 if (rainLevel > 1) rainLevel = 1;
3221
3222 oThunderLevel = thunderLevel;
3223 if (levelData->isThundering())
3224 {
3225 thunderLevel += 0.01;
3226 }
3227 else
3228 {
3229 thunderLevel -= 0.01;
3230 }
3231 if (thunderLevel < 0) thunderLevel = 0;
3232 if (thunderLevel > 1) thunderLevel = 1;
3233}
3234
3235void Level::toggleDownfall()
3236{
3237 // this will trick the tickWeather method to toggle rain next tick
3238 levelData->setRainTime(1);
3239}
3240
3241void Level::buildAndPrepareChunksToPoll()
3242{
3243#if 0
3244 for (auto& player : players)
3245 {
3246 int xx = Mth::floor(player->x / 16);
3247 int zz = Mth::floor(player->z / 16);
3248
3249 int r = CHUNK_POLL_RANGE;
3250 for (int x = -r; x <= r; x++)
3251 for (int z = -r; z <= r; z++)
3252 {
3253 chunksToPoll.insert(ChunkPos(x + xx, z + zz));
3254 }
3255 }
3256#else
3257 // 4J - rewritten to add chunks interleaved by player, and to add them from the centre outwards. We're going to be
3258 // potentially adding less creatures than the original so that our count stays consistent with number of players added, so
3259 // we want to make sure as best we can that the ones we do add are near the active players
3260 int playerCount = static_cast<int>(players.size());
3261 int *xx = new int[playerCount];
3262 int *zz = new int[playerCount];
3263 for (size_t i = 0; i < playerCount; i++)
3264 {
3265 shared_ptr<Player> player = players[i];
3266 xx[i] = Mth::floor(player->x / 16);
3267 zz[i] = Mth::floor(player->z / 16);
3268 chunksToPoll.insert(ChunkPos(xx[i], zz[i] ));
3269 }
3270
3271 for( int r = 1; r <= 9; r++ )
3272 {
3273 for( int l = 0; l < ( r * 2 ) ; l++ )
3274 {
3275 for( int i = 0; i < playerCount; i++ )
3276 {
3277 chunksToPoll.insert(ChunkPos( ( xx[i] - r ) + l , ( zz[i] - r ) ) );
3278 chunksToPoll.insert(ChunkPos( ( xx[i] + r ) , ( zz[i] - r ) + l ) );
3279 chunksToPoll.insert(ChunkPos( ( xx[i] + r ) - l , ( zz[i] + r ) ) );
3280 chunksToPoll.insert(ChunkPos( ( xx[i] - r ) , ( zz[i] + r ) - l ) );
3281 }
3282 }
3283 }
3284 delete [] xx;
3285 delete [] zz;
3286#endif
3287
3288 if (delayUntilNextMoodSound > 0) delayUntilNextMoodSound--;
3289
3290 // 4J Stu - Added 1.2.3, but not sure if we want to do it
3291 //util.Timer.push("playerCheckLight");
3293 //if (!players.isEmpty()) {
3294 // int select = random.nextInt(players.size());
3295 // Player player = players.get(select);
3296 // int px = Mth.floor(player.x) + random.nextInt(11) - 5;
3297 // int py = Mth.floor(player.y) + random.nextInt(11) - 5;
3298 // int pz = Mth.floor(player.z) + random.nextInt(11) - 5;
3299 // checkLight(px, py, pz);
3300 //}
3301 //util.Timer.pop();
3302}
3303
3304void Level::tickClientSideTiles(int xo, int zo, LevelChunk *lc)
3305{
3306 //lc->tick(); // 4J - brought this lighting update forward from 1.8.2
3307
3308 if (delayUntilNextMoodSound == 0 && !isClientSide)
3309 {
3310 randValue = randValue * 3 + addend;
3311 int val = (randValue >> 2);
3312 int x = (val & 15);
3313 int z = ((val >> 8) & 15);
3314 int y = ((val >> 16) & genDepthMinusOne);
3315
3316 int id = lc->getTile(x, y, z);
3317 x += xo;
3318 z += zo;
3319 if (id == 0 && this->getDaytimeRawBrightness(x, y, z) <= random->nextInt(8) && getBrightness(LightLayer::Sky, x, y, z) <= 0)
3320 {
3321 shared_ptr<Player> player = getNearestPlayer(x + 0.5, y + 0.5, z + 0.5, 8);
3322 if (player != nullptr && player->distanceToSqr(x + 0.5, y + 0.5, z + 0.5) > 2 * 2)
3323 {
3324 // 4J-PB - Fixed issue with cave audio event having 2 sounds at 192k
3325#ifdef _XBOX
3326 this->playSound(x + 0.5, y + 0.5, z + 0.5,eSoundType_AMBIENT_CAVE_CAVE2, 0.7f, 0.8f + random->nextFloat() * 0.2f);
3327#else
3328 this->playSound(x + 0.5, y + 0.5, z + 0.5,eSoundType_AMBIENT_CAVE_CAVE, 0.7f, 0.8f + random->nextFloat() * 0.2f);
3329#endif
3330 delayUntilNextMoodSound = random->nextInt(SharedConstants::TICKS_PER_SECOND * 60 * 10) + SharedConstants::TICKS_PER_SECOND * 60 * 5;
3331 }
3332 }
3333 }
3334
3335 // 4J Stu - Added 1.2.3, but do we need it?
3336 //lc->checkNextLight();
3337}
3338
3339void Level::tickTiles()
3340{
3341 buildAndPrepareChunksToPoll();
3342}
3343
3344bool Level::shouldFreezeIgnoreNeighbors(int x, int y, int z)
3345{
3346 return shouldFreeze(x, y, z, false);
3347}
3348
3349bool Level::shouldFreeze(int x, int y, int z)
3350{
3351 return shouldFreeze(x, y, z, true);
3352}
3353
3354bool Level::shouldFreeze(int x, int y, int z, bool checkNeighbors)
3355{
3356 Biome *biome = getBiome(x, z);
3357 float temp = biome->getTemperature();
3358 if (temp > 0.15f) return false;
3359
3360 if (y >= 0 && y < maxBuildHeight && getBrightness(LightLayer::Block, x, y, z) < 10)
3361 {
3362 int current = getTile(x, y, z);
3363 if ((current == Tile::calmWater_Id || current == Tile::water_Id) && getData(x, y, z) == 0)
3364 {
3365 if (!checkNeighbors) return true;
3366
3367 bool surroundedByWater = true;
3368 if (surroundedByWater && getMaterial(x - 1, y, z) != Material::water) surroundedByWater = false;
3369 if (surroundedByWater && getMaterial(x + 1, y, z) != Material::water) surroundedByWater = false;
3370 if (surroundedByWater && getMaterial(x, y, z - 1) != Material::water) surroundedByWater = false;
3371 if (surroundedByWater && getMaterial(x, y, z + 1) != Material::water) surroundedByWater = false;
3372 if (!surroundedByWater) return true;
3373 }
3374 }
3375 return false;
3376}
3377
3378bool Level::shouldSnow(int x, int y, int z)
3379{
3380 Biome *biome = getBiome(x, z);
3381 float temp = biome->getTemperature();
3382 if (temp > 0.15f) return false;
3383
3384
3385 if (y >= 0 && y < maxBuildHeight && getBrightness(LightLayer::Block, x, y, z) < 10)
3386 {
3387 int below = getTile(x, y - 1, z);
3388 int current = getTile(x, y, z);
3389 if (current == 0)
3390 {
3391 if (Tile::topSnow->mayPlace(this, x, y, z) && (below != 0 && below != Tile::ice_Id && Tile::tiles[below]->material->blocksMotion()))
3392 {
3393 return true;
3394 }
3395 }
3396 }
3397
3398 return false;
3399}
3400
3401void Level::checkLight(int x, int y, int z, bool force, bool rootOnlyEmissive) // 4J added force, rootOnlyEmissive parameters
3402{
3403 if (!dimension->hasCeiling) checkLight(LightLayer::Sky, x, y, z, force, false);
3404 checkLight(LightLayer::Block, x, y, z, force, rootOnlyEmissive);
3405}
3406
3407int Level::getExpectedLight(lightCache_t *cache, int x, int y, int z, LightLayer::variety layer, bool propagatedOnly)
3408{
3409 if (layer == LightLayer::Sky && canSeeSky(x, y, z)) return MAX_BRIGHTNESS;
3410 int id = getTile(x, y, z);
3411 int result = layer == LightLayer::Sky ? 0 : Tile::lightEmission[id];
3412 int block = Tile::lightBlock[id];
3413 if (block >= MAX_BRIGHTNESS && Tile::lightEmission[id] > 0) block = 1;
3414 if (block < 1) block = 1;
3415 if (block >= MAX_BRIGHTNESS)
3416 {
3417 return propagatedOnly ? 0 : getEmissionCached(cache, 0, x, y, z);
3418 }
3419
3420 if (result >= MAX_BRIGHTNESS - 1) return result;
3421
3422 for (int face = 0; face < 6; face++)
3423 {
3424 int xx = x + Facing::STEP_X[face];
3425 int yy = y + Facing::STEP_Y[face];
3426 int zz = z + Facing::STEP_Z[face];
3427 int brightness = getBrightnessCached(cache, layer, xx, yy, zz) - block;
3428
3429 if (brightness > result) result = brightness;
3430 if (result >= MAX_BRIGHTNESS - 1) return result;
3431 }
3432
3433 return result;
3434}
3435
3436// 4J - Made changes here so that lighting goes through a cache, if enabled for this thread
3437void Level::checkLight(LightLayer::variety layer, int xc, int yc, int zc, bool force, bool rootOnlyEmissive)
3438{
3439 lightCache_t *cache = static_cast<lightCache_t *>(TlsGetValue(tlsIdxLightCache));
3440 uint64_t cacheUse = 0;
3441
3442 if( force )
3443 {
3444 // 4J - special mode added so we can do lava lighting updates without having all neighbouring chunks loaded in
3445 if (!hasChunksAt(xc, yc, zc, 0)) return;
3446 }
3447 else
3448 {
3449 // 4J - this is normal java behaviour
3450 if (!hasChunksAt(xc, yc, zc, 17)) return;
3451 }
3452
3453#if 0
3455 // Get the frequency of the timer
3456 LARGE_INTEGER qwTicksPerSec, qwTime, qwNewTime, qwDeltaTime1, qwDeltaTime2;
3457 float fElapsedTime1 = 0.0f;
3458 float fElapsedTime2 = 0.0f;
3459 QueryPerformanceFrequency( &qwTicksPerSec );
3460 float fSecsPerTick = 1.0f / (float)qwTicksPerSec.QuadPart;
3461
3462 QueryPerformanceCounter( &qwTime );
3464#endif
3465
3466 EnterCriticalSection(&m_checkLightCS);
3467
3468 initCachePartial(cache, xc, yc, zc);
3469
3470 // If we're in cached mode, then use memory allocated after the cached data itself for the toCheck array, in an attempt to make both that & the other cached data sit on the CPU L2 cache better.
3471
3472 int *toCheck;
3473 if( cache == nullptr )
3474 {
3475 toCheck = toCheckLevel;
3476 }
3477 else
3478 {
3479 toCheck = reinterpret_cast<int *>(cache + (16 * 16 * 16));
3480 }
3481
3482 int checkedPosition = 0;
3483 int toCheckCount = 0;
3484 //int darktcc = 0;
3485
3486
3487 // 4J - added
3488 int minXZ = - (dimension->getXZSize() * 16 ) / 2;
3489 int maxXZ = (dimension->getXZSize() * 16 ) / 2 - 1;
3490 if( ( xc > maxXZ ) || ( xc < minXZ ) || ( zc > maxXZ ) || ( zc < minXZ ) )
3491 {
3492 LeaveCriticalSection(&m_checkLightCS);
3493 return;
3494 }
3495
3496 // Lock 128K of cache (containing all the lighting cache + first 112K of toCheck array) on L2 to try and stop any cached data getting knocked out of L2 by other non-cached reads (or vice-versa)
3497 // if( cache ) XLockL2(XLOCKL2_INDEX_TITLE, cache, 128 * 1024, XLOCKL2_LOCK_SIZE_1_WAY, 0 );
3498
3499 {
3500 int centerCurrent = getBrightnessCached(cache, layer, xc, yc, zc);
3501 int centerExpected = getExpectedLight(cache, xc, yc, zc, layer, false);
3502
3503 if( centerExpected != centerCurrent && cache )
3504 {
3505 initCacheComplete(cache, xc, yc, zc);
3506 }
3507
3508 if (centerExpected > centerCurrent)
3509 {
3510 toCheck[toCheckCount++] = 32 | (32 << 6) | (32 << 12);
3511 }
3512 else if (centerExpected < centerCurrent)
3513 {
3514 // 4J - added tcn. This is the code that is run when checkLight has been called for a light source that has got darker / turned off.
3515 // In the original version, after zeroing tiles brightnesses that are deemed to come from this light source, all the zeroed tiles are then passed to the next
3516 // stage of the function to potentially have their brightnesses put back up again. We shouldn't need to consider All these tiles as starting points for this process, now just
3517 // considering the edge tiles (defined as a tile where we have a neighbour that is brightner than can be explained by the original light source we are turning off)
3518 int tcn = 0;
3519 if (layer == LightLayer::Block || true)
3520 {
3521 toCheck[toCheckCount++] = 32 | (32 << 6) | (32 << 12) | (centerCurrent << 18);
3522 while (checkedPosition < toCheckCount)
3523 {
3524 int p = toCheck[checkedPosition++];
3525 int x = ((p) & 63) - 32 + xc;
3526 int y = ((p >> 6) & 63) - 32 + yc;
3527 int z = ((p >> 12) & 63) - 32 + zc;
3528 int expected = ((p >> 18) & 15);
3529 int current = getBrightnessCached(cache, layer, x, y, z);
3530 if (current == expected)
3531 {
3532 setBrightnessCached(cache, &cacheUse, layer, x, y, z, 0);
3533 // cexp--; // 4J - removed, change from 1.2.3
3534 if (expected > 0)
3535 {
3536 int xd = Mth::abs(x - xc);
3537 int yd = Mth::abs(y - yc);
3538 int zd = Mth::abs(z - zc);
3539 if (xd + yd + zd < 17)
3540 {
3541 bool edge = false;
3542 for (int face = 0; face < 6; face++)
3543 {
3544 int xx = x + Facing::STEP_X[face];
3545 int yy = y + Facing::STEP_Y[face];
3546 int zz = z + Facing::STEP_Z[face];
3547
3548 // 4J - added - don't let this lighting creep out of the normal fixed world and into the infinite water chunks beyond
3549 if( ( xx > maxXZ ) || ( xx < minXZ ) || ( zz > maxXZ ) || ( zz < minXZ ) ) continue;
3550 if( ( yy < 0 ) || ( yy >= maxBuildHeight ) ) continue;
3551
3552 // 4J - some changes here brought forward from 1.2.3
3553 int block = max(1, getBlockingCached(cache, layer, nullptr, xx, yy, zz) );
3554 current = getBrightnessCached(cache, layer, xx, yy, zz);
3555 if ((current == expected - block) && (toCheckCount < (32 * 32 * 32))) // 4J - 32 * 32 * 32 was toCheck.length
3556 {
3557 toCheck[toCheckCount++] = (xx - xc + 32) | ((yy - yc + 32) << 6) | ((zz - zc + 32) << 12) | ((expected - block) << 18);
3558 }
3559 else
3560 {
3561 // 4J - added - keep track of which tiles form the edge of the region we are zeroing
3562 if( current > ( expected - block ) )
3563 {
3564 edge = true;
3565 }
3566 }
3567 }
3568 // 4J - added - keep track of which tiles form the edge of the region we are zeroing - can store over the original elements in the array because tcn must be <= tcp
3569 if( edge == true )
3570 {
3571 toCheck[tcn++] = p;
3572 }
3573 }
3574 }
3575
3576 }
3577 }
3578 }
3579 checkedPosition = 0;
3580 // darktcc = tcc; ///////////////////////////////////////////////////
3581 toCheckCount = tcn; // 4J added - we've moved all the edge tiles to the start of the array, so only need to process these now. The original processes all tcc tiles again in the next section
3582 }
3583 }
3584
3585 while (checkedPosition < toCheckCount)
3586 {
3587 int p = toCheck[checkedPosition++];
3588 int x = ((p) & 63) - 32 + xc;
3589 int y = ((p >> 6) & 63) - 32 + yc;
3590 int z = ((p >> 12) & 63) - 32 + zc;
3591
3592 // If force is set, then this is being used to in a special mode to try and light lava tiles as chunks are being loaded in. In this case, we
3593 // don't want a lighting update to drag in any neighbouring chunks that aren't loaded yet.
3594 if( force )
3595 {
3596 if( !hasChunkAt(x,y,z) )
3597 {
3598 continue;
3599 }
3600 }
3601 int current = getBrightnessCached(cache, layer, x, y, z);
3602
3603 // If rootOnlyEmissive flag is set, then only consider the starting tile to be possibly emissive.
3604 bool propagatedOnly = false;
3605 if (layer == LightLayer::Block)
3606 {
3607 if( rootOnlyEmissive )
3608 {
3609 propagatedOnly = ( x != xc ) || ( y != yc ) || ( z != zc );
3610 }
3611 }
3612 int expected = getExpectedLight(cache, x, y, z, layer, propagatedOnly);
3613
3614 if (expected != current)
3615 {
3616 setBrightnessCached(cache, &cacheUse, layer, x, y, z, expected);
3617
3618 if (expected > current)
3619 {
3620 int xd = abs(x - xc);
3621 int yd = abs(y - yc);
3622 int zd = abs(z - zc);
3623 bool withinBounds = toCheckCount < (32 * 32 * 32) - 6; // 4J - 32 * 32 * 32 was toCheck.length
3624 if (xd + yd + zd < 17 && withinBounds)
3625 {
3626 // 4J - added extra checks here to stop lighting updates moving out of the actual fixed world and into the infinite water chunks
3627 if( ( x - 1 ) >= minXZ ) { if (getBrightnessCached(cache, layer, x - 1, y, z) < expected) toCheck[toCheckCount++] = (((x - 1 - xc) + 32)) + (((y - yc) + 32) << 6) + (((z - zc) + 32) << 12); }
3628 if( ( x + 1 ) <= maxXZ ) { if (getBrightnessCached(cache, layer, x + 1, y, z) < expected) toCheck[toCheckCount++] = (((x + 1 - xc) + 32)) + (((y - yc) + 32) << 6) + (((z - zc) + 32) << 12); }
3629 if( ( y - 1 ) >= 0 ) { if (getBrightnessCached(cache, layer, x, y - 1, z) < expected) toCheck[toCheckCount++] = (((x - xc) + 32)) + (((y - 1 - yc) + 32) << 6) + (((z - zc) + 32) << 12); }
3630 if( ( y + 1 ) < maxBuildHeight ) { if (getBrightnessCached(cache, layer, x, y + 1, z) < expected) toCheck[toCheckCount++] = (((x - xc) + 32)) + (((y + 1 - yc) + 32) << 6) + (((z - zc) + 32) << 12); }
3631 if( ( z - 1 ) >= minXZ ) { if (getBrightnessCached(cache, layer, x, y, z - 1) < expected) toCheck[toCheckCount++] = (((x - xc) + 32)) + (((y - yc) + 32) << 6) + (((z - 1 - zc) + 32) << 12); }
3632 if( ( z + 1 ) <= maxXZ ) { if (getBrightnessCached(cache, layer, x, y, z + 1) < expected) toCheck[toCheckCount++] = (((x - xc) + 32)) + (((y - yc) + 32) << 6) + (((z + 1 - zc) + 32) << 12); }
3633 }
3634 }
3635 }
3636 }
3637 // if( cache ) XUnlockL2(XLOCKL2_INDEX_TITLE);
3638#if 0
3639 QueryPerformanceCounter( &qwNewTime );
3640 qwDeltaTime1.QuadPart = qwNewTime.QuadPart - qwTime.QuadPart;
3641 qwTime = qwNewTime;
3642#endif
3643
3644 flushCache(cache, cacheUse, layer);
3645#if 0
3647 if( cache )
3648 {
3649 QueryPerformanceCounter( &qwNewTime );
3650 qwDeltaTime2.QuadPart = qwNewTime.QuadPart - qwTime.QuadPart;
3651 fElapsedTime1 = fSecsPerTick * ((FLOAT)(qwDeltaTime1.QuadPart));
3652 fElapsedTime2 = fSecsPerTick * ((FLOAT)(qwDeltaTime2.QuadPart));
3653 if( ( darktcc > 0 ) | ( tcc > 0 ) )
3654 {
3655 printf("%d %d %d %f + %f = %f\n", darktcc, tcc, darktcc + tcc, fElapsedTime1 * 1000.0f, fElapsedTime2 * 1000.0f, ( fElapsedTime1 + fElapsedTime2 ) * 1000.0f);
3656 }
3657 }
3659#endif
3660 LeaveCriticalSection(&m_checkLightCS);
3661
3662}
3663
3664
3665bool Level::tickPendingTicks(bool force)
3666{
3667 return false;
3668}
3669
3670vector<TickNextTickData> *Level::fetchTicksInChunk(LevelChunk *chunk, bool remove)
3671{
3672 return nullptr;
3673}
3674
3675
3676vector<shared_ptr<Entity> > *Level::getEntities(shared_ptr<Entity> except, AABB *bb)
3677{
3678 return getEntities(except, bb, nullptr);
3679}
3680
3681vector<shared_ptr<Entity> > *Level::getEntities(shared_ptr<Entity> except, AABB *bb, const EntitySelector *selector)
3682{
3683 MemSect(40);
3684 es.clear();
3685 int xc0 = Mth::floor((bb->x0 - 2) / 16);
3686 int xc1 = Mth::floor((bb->x1 + 2) / 16);
3687 int zc0 = Mth::floor((bb->z0 - 2) / 16);
3688 int zc1 = Mth::floor((bb->z1 + 2) / 16);
3689
3690#ifdef __PSVITA__
3691#ifdef _ENTITIES_RW_SECTION
3692 // AP - RW critical sections are expensive so enter it here so we only have to call it once instead of X times
3693 EnterCriticalRWSection(&LevelChunk::m_csEntities, false);
3694#else
3695 EnterCriticalSection(&LevelChunk::m_csEntities);
3696#endif
3697#endif
3698
3699 for (int xc = xc0; xc <= xc1; xc++)
3700 for (int zc = zc0; zc <= zc1; zc++)
3701 {
3702 if (hasChunk(xc, zc))
3703 {
3704 getChunk(xc, zc)->getEntities(except, bb, es, selector);
3705 }
3706 }
3707 MemSect(0);
3708
3709#ifdef __PSVITA__
3710#ifdef _ENTITIES_RW_SECTION
3711 LeaveCriticalRWSection(&LevelChunk::m_csEntities, false);
3712#else
3713 LeaveCriticalSection(&LevelChunk::m_csEntities);
3714#endif
3715#endif
3716
3717 return &es;
3718}
3719
3720vector<shared_ptr<Entity> > *Level::getEntitiesOfClass(const type_info& baseClass, AABB *bb)
3721{
3722 return getEntitiesOfClass(baseClass, bb, nullptr);
3723}
3724
3725vector<shared_ptr<Entity> > *Level::getEntitiesOfClass(const type_info& baseClass, AABB *bb, const EntitySelector *selector)
3726{
3727 int xc0 = Mth::floor((bb->x0 - 2) / 16);
3728 int xc1 = Mth::floor((bb->x1 + 2) / 16);
3729 int zc0 = Mth::floor((bb->z0 - 2) / 16);
3730 int zc1 = Mth::floor((bb->z1 + 2) / 16);
3731 vector<shared_ptr<Entity> > *es = new vector<shared_ptr<Entity> >();
3732
3733#ifdef __PSVITA__
3734#ifdef _ENTITIES_RW_SECTION
3735 // AP - RW critical sections are expensive so enter it here so we only have to call it once instead of X times
3736 EnterCriticalRWSection(&LevelChunk::m_csEntities, false);
3737#else
3738 EnterCriticalSection(&LevelChunk::m_csEntities);
3739#endif
3740#endif
3741
3742 for (int xc = xc0; xc <= xc1; xc++)
3743 {
3744 for (int zc = zc0; zc <= zc1; zc++)
3745 {
3746 if (hasChunk(xc, zc))
3747 {
3748 getChunk(xc, zc)->getEntitiesOfClass(baseClass, bb, *es, selector);
3749 }
3750 }
3751 }
3752
3753#ifdef __PSVITA__
3754#ifdef _ENTITIES_RW_SECTION
3755 LeaveCriticalRWSection(&LevelChunk::m_csEntities, false);
3756#else
3757 LeaveCriticalSection(&LevelChunk::m_csEntities);
3758#endif
3759#endif
3760
3761 return es;
3762}
3763
3764shared_ptr<Entity> Level::getClosestEntityOfClass(const type_info& baseClass, AABB *bb, shared_ptr<Entity> source)
3765{
3766 vector<shared_ptr<Entity> > *entities = getEntitiesOfClass(baseClass, bb);
3767 shared_ptr<Entity> closest = nullptr;
3768 double closestDistSqr = Double::MAX_VALUE;
3769 //for (Entity entity : entities)
3770 for(auto& entity : *entities)
3771 {
3772 if (entity == source) continue;
3773 double distSqr = source->distanceToSqr(entity);
3774 if (distSqr > closestDistSqr) continue;
3775 closest = entity;
3776 closestDistSqr = distSqr;
3777 }
3778 delete entities;
3779 return closest;
3780}
3781
3782vector<shared_ptr<Entity> > Level::getAllEntities()
3783{
3784 EnterCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
3785 vector<shared_ptr<Entity> > retVec = entities;
3786 LeaveCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
3787 return retVec;
3788}
3789
3790
3791void Level::tileEntityChanged(int x, int y, int z, shared_ptr<TileEntity> te)
3792{
3793 if (this->hasChunkAt(x, y, z))
3794 {
3795 getChunkAt(x, z)->markUnsaved();
3796 }
3797}
3798
3799#if 0
3800unsigned int Level::countInstanceOf(BaseObject::Class *clas)
3801{
3802 unsigned int count = 0;
3803 EnterCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
3804 for (auto& e : entities)
3805 {
3806 if (clas->isAssignableFrom(e->getClass())) count++;
3807 }
3808 LeaveCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
3809
3810 return count;
3811}
3812#endif
3813
3814// 4J - added - more limited (but faster) version of above, used to count water animals, animals, monsters for the mob spawner
3815// singleType flag should be true if we are just trying to match eINSTANCEOF exactly, and false if it is a eINSTANCEOF from a group (eTYPE_WATERANIMAL, eTYPE_ANIMAL, eTYPE_MONSTER)
3816unsigned int Level::countInstanceOf(eINSTANCEOF clas, bool singleType, unsigned int *protectedCount/* = nullptr*/, unsigned int *couldWanderCount/* = nullptr*/)
3817{
3818 unsigned int count = 0;
3819 if( protectedCount ) *protectedCount = 0;
3820 if( couldWanderCount ) *couldWanderCount = 0;
3821 EnterCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
3822 for (auto& e : entities)
3823 {
3824 if( singleType )
3825 {
3826 if (e->GetType() == clas)
3827 {
3828 if ( protectedCount && e->isDespawnProtected() )
3829 {
3830 (*protectedCount)++;
3831 }
3832
3833 if ( couldWanderCount && e->couldWander() )
3834 {
3835 (*couldWanderCount)++;
3836 }
3837
3838 count++;
3839 }
3840 }
3841 else
3842 {
3843 if (e->instanceof(clas)) count++;
3844 }
3845 }
3846 LeaveCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
3847
3848 return count;
3849}
3850
3851unsigned int Level::countInstanceOfInRange(eINSTANCEOF clas, bool singleType, int range, int x, int y, int z)
3852{
3853 unsigned int count = 0;
3854 EnterCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
3855 for (auto& e : entities)
3856 {
3857 float sd = e->distanceTo(x,y,z);
3858 if (sd * sd > range * range)
3859 {
3860 continue;
3861 }
3862
3863 if( singleType )
3864 {
3865 if (e->GetType() == clas)
3866 {
3867 count++;
3868 }
3869 }
3870 else
3871 {
3872 if (e->instanceof(clas)) count++;
3873 }
3874 }
3875 LeaveCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
3876
3877 return count;
3878}
3879
3880void Level::addEntities(vector<shared_ptr<Entity> > *list)
3881{
3882 //entities.addAll(list);
3883 EnterCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
3884 entities.insert(entities.end(), list->begin(), list->end());
3885 bool deleteDragons = false;
3886 for (auto& it : *list)
3887 {
3888 entityAdded(it);
3889
3890 // 4J Stu - Special change to remove duplicate enderdragons that a previous bug might have produced
3891 if( it->GetType() == eTYPE_ENDERDRAGON)
3892 {
3893 deleteDragons = true;
3894 }
3895 }
3896
3897 if(deleteDragons)
3898 {
3899 deleteDragons = false;
3900 for(auto& it : entities)
3901 {
3902 // 4J Stu - Special change to remove duplicate enderdragons that a previous bug might have produced
3903 if( it->GetType() == eTYPE_ENDERDRAGON)
3904 {
3905 if(deleteDragons)
3906 {
3907 it->remove();
3908 }
3909 else
3910 {
3911 deleteDragons = true;
3912 }
3913 }
3914 }
3915 }
3916 LeaveCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
3917}
3918
3919
3920void Level::removeEntities(vector<shared_ptr<Entity> > *list)
3921{
3922 //entitiesToRemove.addAll(list);
3923 entitiesToRemove.insert(entitiesToRemove.end(), list->begin(), list->end());
3924}
3925
3926bool Level::mayPlace(int tileId, int x, int y, int z, bool ignoreEntities, int face, shared_ptr<Entity> ignoreEntity, shared_ptr<ItemInstance> item)
3927{
3928 int targetType = getTile(x, y, z);
3929 Tile *targetTile = Tile::tiles[targetType];
3930
3931 Tile *tile = Tile::tiles[tileId];
3932
3933 AABB *aabb = tile->getAABB(this, x, y, z);
3934 if (ignoreEntities) aabb = nullptr;
3935 if (aabb != nullptr && !isUnobstructed(aabb, ignoreEntity)) return false;
3936 if (targetTile != nullptr &&
3937 (targetTile == Tile::water || targetTile == Tile::calmWater || targetTile == Tile::lava ||
3938 targetTile == Tile::calmLava || targetTile == Tile::fire || targetTile->material->isReplaceable()))
3939 {
3940 targetTile = nullptr;
3941 }
3942 if (targetTile != nullptr && targetTile->material == Material::decoration && tile == Tile::anvil) return true;
3943 if (tileId > 0 && targetTile == nullptr)
3944 {
3945 if (tile->mayPlace(this, x, y, z, face, item))
3946 {
3947 return true;
3948 }
3949 }
3950 return false;
3951}
3952
3953
3954int Level::getSeaLevel()
3955{
3956 return seaLevel;
3957}
3958
3959
3960Path *Level::findPath(shared_ptr<Entity> from, shared_ptr<Entity> to, float maxDist, bool canPassDoors, bool canOpenDoors, bool avoidWater, bool canFloat)
3961{
3962 int x = Mth::floor(from->x);
3963 int y = Mth::floor(from->y + 1);
3964 int z = Mth::floor(from->z);
3965
3966 int r = static_cast<int>(maxDist + 16);
3967 int x1 = x - r;
3968 int y1 = y - r;
3969 int z1 = z - r;
3970 int x2 = x + r;
3971 int y2 = y + r;
3972 int z2 = z + r;
3973 Region region = Region(this, x1, y1, z1, x2, y2, z2, 0);
3974 Path *path = (PathFinder(&region, canPassDoors, canOpenDoors, avoidWater, canFloat)).findPath(from.get(), to.get(), maxDist);
3975 return path;
3976}
3977
3978
3979Path *Level::findPath(shared_ptr<Entity> from, int xBest, int yBest, int zBest, float maxDist, bool canPassDoors, bool canOpenDoors, bool avoidWater, bool canFloat)
3980{
3981 int x = Mth::floor(from->x);
3982 int y = Mth::floor(from->y);
3983 int z = Mth::floor(from->z);
3984
3985 int r = static_cast<int>(maxDist + 8);
3986 int x1 = x - r;
3987 int y1 = y - r;
3988 int z1 = z - r;
3989 int x2 = x + r;
3990 int y2 = y + r;
3991 int z2 = z + r;
3992 Region region = Region(this, x1, y1, z1, x2, y2, z2, 0);
3993 Path *path = (PathFinder(&region, canPassDoors, canOpenDoors, avoidWater, canFloat)).findPath(from.get(), xBest, yBest, zBest, maxDist);
3994 return path;
3995}
3996
3997
3998int Level::getDirectSignal(int x, int y, int z, int dir)
3999{
4000 int t = getTile(x, y, z);
4001 if (t == 0) return Redstone::SIGNAL_NONE;
4002 return Tile::tiles[t]->getDirectSignal(this, x, y, z, dir);
4003}
4004
4005int Level::getDirectSignalTo(int x, int y, int z)
4006{
4007 int result = Redstone::SIGNAL_NONE;
4008 result = max(result, getDirectSignal(x, y - 1, z, 0));
4009 if (result >= Redstone::SIGNAL_MAX) return result;
4010 result = max(result, getDirectSignal(x, y + 1, z, 1));
4011 if (result >= Redstone::SIGNAL_MAX) return result;
4012 result = max(result, getDirectSignal(x, y, z - 1, 2));
4013 if (result >= Redstone::SIGNAL_MAX) return result;
4014 result = max(result, getDirectSignal(x, y, z + 1, 3));
4015 if (result >= Redstone::SIGNAL_MAX) return result;
4016 result = max(result, getDirectSignal(x - 1, y, z, 4));
4017 if (result >= Redstone::SIGNAL_MAX) return result;
4018 result = max(result, getDirectSignal(x + 1, y, z, 5));
4019 if (result >= Redstone::SIGNAL_MAX) return result;
4020 return result;
4021}
4022
4023bool Level::hasSignal(int x, int y, int z, int dir)
4024{
4025 return getSignal(x, y, z, dir) > Redstone::SIGNAL_NONE;
4026}
4027
4028int Level::getSignal(int x, int y, int z, int dir)
4029{
4030 if (isSolidBlockingTile(x, y, z))
4031 {
4032 return getDirectSignalTo(x, y, z);
4033 }
4034 int t = getTile(x, y, z);
4035 if (t == 0) return Redstone::SIGNAL_NONE;
4036 return Tile::tiles[t]->getSignal(this, x, y, z, dir);
4037}
4038
4039bool Level::hasNeighborSignal(int x, int y, int z)
4040{
4041 if (getSignal(x, y - 1, z, 0) > 0) return true;
4042 if (getSignal(x, y + 1, z, 1) > 0) return true;
4043 if (getSignal(x, y, z - 1, 2) > 0) return true;
4044 if (getSignal(x, y, z + 1, 3) > 0) return true;
4045 if (getSignal(x - 1, y, z, 4) > 0) return true;
4046 if (getSignal(x + 1, y, z, 5) > 0) return true;
4047 return false;
4048}
4049
4050int Level::getBestNeighborSignal(int x, int y, int z)
4051{
4052 int best = Redstone::SIGNAL_NONE;
4053
4054 for (int i = 0; i < 6; i++)
4055 {
4056 int signal = getSignal(x + Facing::STEP_X[i], y + Facing::STEP_Y[i], z + Facing::STEP_Z[i], i);
4057
4058 if (signal >= Redstone::SIGNAL_MAX) return Redstone::SIGNAL_MAX;
4059 if (signal > best) best = signal;
4060 }
4061
4062 return best;
4063}
4064
4065// 4J Stu - Added maxYDist param
4066shared_ptr<Player> Level::getNearestPlayer(shared_ptr<Entity> source, double maxDist, double maxYDist /*= -1*/)
4067{
4068 return getNearestPlayer(source->x, source->y, source->z, maxDist, maxYDist);
4069}
4070
4071// 4J Stu - Added maxYDist param
4072shared_ptr<Player> Level::getNearestPlayer(double x, double y, double z, double maxDist, double maxYDist /*= -1*/)
4073{
4074 MemSect(21);
4075 double best = -1;
4076 shared_ptr<Player> result = nullptr;
4077 for (auto& p : players)
4078 {
4079 double dist = p->distanceToSqr(x, y, z);
4080
4081 // Allow specifying shorter distances in the vertical
4082 if(maxYDist > 0 && abs(p->y - y) > maxYDist) continue;
4083
4084 // 4J Stu - Added check that this player is still alive
4085 if ((maxDist < 0 || dist < maxDist * maxDist) && (best == -1 || dist < best) && p->isAlive() )
4086 {
4087 best = dist;
4088 result = p;
4089 }
4090 }
4091 MemSect(0);
4092 return result;
4093}
4094
4095shared_ptr<Player> Level::getNearestPlayer(double x, double z, double maxDist)
4096{
4097 double best = -1;
4098 shared_ptr<Player> result = nullptr;
4099 for (auto& p : players)
4100 {
4101 double dist = p->distanceToSqr(x, p->y, z);
4102 if ((maxDist < 0 || dist < maxDist * maxDist) && (best == -1 || dist < best))
4103 {
4104 best = dist;
4105 result = p;
4106 }
4107 }
4108 return result;
4109}
4110
4111shared_ptr<Player> Level::getNearestAttackablePlayer(shared_ptr<Entity> source, double maxDist)
4112{
4113 return getNearestAttackablePlayer(source->x, source->y, source->z, maxDist);
4114}
4115
4116shared_ptr<Player> Level::getNearestAttackablePlayer(double x, double y, double z, double maxDist)
4117{
4118 double best = -1;
4119
4120 shared_ptr<Player> result = nullptr;
4121 for (auto& p : players)
4122 {
4123 // 4J Stu - Added privilege check
4124 if (p->abilities.invulnerable || !p->isAlive() || p->hasInvisiblePrivilege() )
4125 {
4126 continue;
4127 }
4128
4129 double dist = p->distanceToSqr(x, y, z);
4130 double visibleDist = maxDist;
4131
4132 // decrease the max attackable distance if the target player
4133 // is sneaking or invisible
4134 if (p->isSneaking())
4135 {
4136 visibleDist *= .8f;
4137 }
4138 if (p->isInvisible())
4139 {
4140 float coverPercentage = p->getArmorCoverPercentage();
4141 if (coverPercentage < .1f)
4142 {
4143 coverPercentage = .1f;
4144 }
4145 visibleDist *= (.7f * coverPercentage);
4146 }
4147
4148 if ((visibleDist < 0 || dist < visibleDist * visibleDist) && (best == -1 || dist < best))
4149 {
4150 best = dist;
4151 result = p;
4152 }
4153 }
4154 return result;
4155}
4156
4157shared_ptr<Player> Level::getPlayerByName(const wstring& name)
4158{
4159 for (auto& player : players)
4160 {
4161 if (name.compare( player->getName()) == 0)
4162 {
4163 return player;
4164 }
4165 }
4166 return {};
4167}
4168
4169shared_ptr<Player> Level::getPlayerByUUID(const wstring& name)
4170{
4171 for (auto& player : players)
4172 {
4173 if (name.compare( player->getUUID() ) == 0)
4174 {
4175 return player;
4176 }
4177 }
4178 return {};
4179}
4180
4181// 4J Stu - Removed in 1.2.3 ?
4182byteArray Level::getBlocksAndData(int x, int y, int z, int xs, int ys, int zs, bool includeLighting/* = true*/)
4183{
4184 byteArray result( xs * ys * zs * 5 / 2 );
4185 int xc0 = x >> 4;
4186 int zc0 = z >> 4;
4187 int xc1 = (x + xs - 1) >> 4;
4188 int zc1 = (z + zs - 1) >> 4;
4189
4190 int p = 0;
4191
4192 int y0 = y;
4193 int y1 = y + ys;
4194 if (y0 < 0) y0 = 0;
4195 if (y1 > Level::maxBuildHeight) y1 = Level::maxBuildHeight;
4196 for (int xc = xc0; xc <= xc1; xc++)
4197 {
4198 int x0 = x - xc * 16;
4199 int x1 = x + xs - xc * 16;
4200 if (x0 < 0) x0 = 0;
4201 if (x1 > 16) x1 = 16;
4202 for (int zc = zc0; zc <= zc1; zc++)
4203 {
4204 int z0 = z - zc * 16;
4205 int z1 = z + zs - zc * 16;
4206 if (z0 < 0) z0 = 0;
4207 if (z1 > 16) z1 = 16;
4208 p = getChunk(xc, zc)->getBlocksAndData(&result, x0, y0, z0, x1, y1, z1, p, includeLighting);
4209 }
4210 }
4211
4212 return result;
4213}
4214
4215// 4J Stu - Removed in 1.2.3 ?
4216void Level::setBlocksAndData(int x, int y, int z, int xs, int ys, int zs, byteArray data, bool includeLighting/* = true*/)
4217{
4218 int xc0 = x >> 4;
4219 int zc0 = z >> 4;
4220 int xc1 = (x + xs - 1) >> 4;
4221 int zc1 = (z + zs - 1) >> 4;
4222
4223 int p = 0;
4224
4225 int y0 = y;
4226 int y1 = y + ys;
4227 if (y0 < 0) y0 = 0;
4228 if (y1 > Level::maxBuildHeight) y1 = Level::maxBuildHeight;
4229 for (int xc = xc0; xc <= xc1; xc++)
4230 {
4231 int x0 = x - xc * 16;
4232 int x1 = x + xs - xc * 16;
4233 if (x0 < 0) x0 = 0;
4234 if (x1 > 16) x1 = 16;
4235 for (int zc = zc0; zc <= zc1; zc++)
4236 {
4237 int z0 = z - zc * 16;
4238 int z1 = z + zs - zc * 16;
4239 if (z0 < 0) z0 = 0;
4240 if (z1 > 16) z1 = 16;
4241 LevelChunk *lc = getChunk(xc, zc);
4242 if(lc->isEmpty())
4243 {
4244 app.DebugPrintf("[SETBLOCKS-BUG] getChunk(%d,%d) returned EmptyLevelChunk! Data will be LOST\n", xc, zc);
4245 }
4246 // 4J Stu - Unshare before we make any changes incase the server is already another step ahead of us
4247 // Fix for #7904 - Gameplay: Players can dupe torches by throwing them repeatedly into water.
4248 // This is quite expensive so only actually do it if we are hosting, online, and the update will actually
4249 // change something
4250 bool forceUnshare = false;
4251 if( g_NetworkManager.IsHost() && isClientSide )
4252 {
4253 forceUnshare = lc->testSetBlocksAndData(data, x0, y0, z0, x1, y1, z1, p);
4254 }
4255 if( forceUnshare )
4256 {
4257 int size = (x1 - x0 ) * ( y1 - y0 ) * ( z1 - z0 );
4258 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"Chunk data unsharing %d\n", size);
4259 lc->stopSharingTilesAndData();
4260 PIXEndNamedEvent();
4261 }
4262 if(p < data.length) p = lc->setBlocksAndData(data, x0, y0, z0, x1, y1, z1, p, includeLighting);
4263 setTilesDirty(xc * 16 + x0, y0, zc * 16 + z0, xc * 16 + x1, y1, zc * 16 + z1);
4264
4265 PIXBeginNamedEvent(0,"Chunk data sharing\n");
4266 if( g_NetworkManager.IsHost() && isClientSide )
4267 {
4268 lc->startSharingTilesAndData();
4269 }
4270 PIXEndNamedEvent();
4271 }
4272 }
4273}
4274

4276void Level::disconnect(bool sendDisconnect /*= true*/)

4280
4281void Level::checkSession()
4282{

4285
4286
4287void Level::setGameTime(int64_t time)
4288{
4289 // 4J : WESTY : Added to track game time played by players for other awards.
4290 if (time != 0) // Ignore setting time to 0, done at level start and during tutorial.
4291 {
4292 // Determine step in time and ensure it is reasonable ( we only have an int to store the player stat).
4293 int64_t timeDiff = time - levelData->getGameTime();
4294
4295 if (timeDiff < 0)
4296 {
4297 timeDiff = 0;
4298 }
4299 else if (timeDiff > 100)
4300 {
4301 // Time differences of more than ~5 seconds are generally not real time passing so ignore (moving dimensions does this)
4302 app.DebugPrintf("Level::setTime: Massive time difference, ignoring for time passed stat (%lli)\n", timeDiff);
4303 timeDiff = 0;
4304 }
4305
4306 // Apply stat to each player.
4307 if ( timeDiff > 0 && levelData->getGameTime() != -1 )
4308 {
4309 for (auto& player : players)
4310 {
4311 player->awardStat( GenericStats::timePlayed(), GenericStats::param_time(timeDiff) );
4312 }
4313 }
4314 }
4315
4316 levelData->setGameTime(time);
4317}

4353
4354void Level::ensureAdded(shared_ptr<Entity> entity)
4355{
4356 int xc = Mth::floor(entity->x / 16);
4357 int zc = Mth::floor(entity->z / 16);
4358 int r = 2;
4359 for (int x = xc - r; x <= xc + r; x++)
4360 {
4361 for (int z = zc - r; z <= zc + r; z++)
4362 {
4363 getChunk(x, z);
4364 }
4365 }
4366
4367 //if (!entities.contains(entity))
4368 EnterCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
4369 if( find(entities.begin(), entities.end(), entity) == entities.end() )
4370 {
4371 entities.push_back(entity);
4372 }
4373 LeaveCriticalSection(&m_entitiesCS);
4374}

4418
4419float Level::getThunderLevel(float a)
4420{
4421 return (oThunderLevel + (thunderLevel - oThunderLevel) * a) * getRainLevel(a);
4422}
4423
4424
4425float Level::getRainLevel(float a)
4426{
4427 return oRainLevel + (rainLevel - oRainLevel) * a;
4428}
4429
4430
4431void Level::setRainLevel(float rainLevel)
4432{
4433 oRainLevel = rainLevel;
4434 this->rainLevel = rainLevel;
4435}
4436
4437
4438bool Level::isThundering()
4439{
4440 return getThunderLevel(1) > 0.9;
4441}
4442
4443
4444bool Level::isRaining()
4445{
4446 return getRainLevel(1) > 0.2;
4447}
4448
4449
4450bool Level::isRainingAt(int x, int y, int z)
4451{
4452 if (!isRaining()) return false;
4453 if (!canSeeSky(x, y, z)) return false;
4454 if (getTopRainBlock(x, z) > y) return false;
4455
4456 // 4J - changed to use new method of getting biomedata that caches results of rain & snow
4457 if (biomeHasSnow(x, z)) return false;
4458 return biomeHasRain(x, z);
4459}
4460
4461bool Level::isHumidAt(int x, int y, int z)
4462{
4463 Biome *biome = getBiome(x, z);
4464 return biome->isHumid();
4465}

4529{

4567Scoreboard *Level::getScoreboard()
4568{

4570}
4571
4572void Level::updateNeighbourForOutputSignal(int x, int y, int z, int source)
4573{
4574 for (int dir = 0; dir < 4; dir++)
4575 {
4576 int xx = x + Direction::STEP_X[dir];
4577 int zz = z + Direction::STEP_Z[dir];
4578 int id = getTile(xx, y, zz);
4579 if (id == 0) continue;
4580 Tile *tile = Tile::tiles[id];
4581
4582 if (Tile::comparator_off->isSameDiode(id))
4583 {
4584 tile->neighborChanged(this, xx, y, zz, source);
4585 }
4586 else if (Tile::isSolidBlockingTile(id))
4587 {
4588 xx += Direction::STEP_X[dir];
4589 zz += Direction::STEP_Z[dir];
4590 id = getTile(xx, y, zz);
4591 tile = Tile::tiles[id];
4592
4593 if (Tile::comparator_off->isSameDiode(id))
4594 {
4595 tile->neighborChanged(this, xx, y, zz, source);
4596 }
4597 }
4598 }
4599}
4600
4601float Level::getDifficulty(double x, double y, double z)
4602{
4603 return getDifficulty(Mth::floor(x), Mth::floor(y), Mth::floor(z));
4604}
4605
4610float Level::getDifficulty(int x, int y, int z)
4611{
4612 float result = 0;
4613 bool isHard = difficulty == Difficulty::HARD;
4614
4615 if (hasChunkAt(x, y, z))
4616 {
4617 float moonBrightness = getMoonBrightness();
4618
4619 result += Mth::clamp(getChunkAt(x, z)->inhabitedTime / (TICKS_PER_DAY * 150.0f), 0.0f, 1.0f) * (isHard ? 1.0f : 0.75f);
4620 result += moonBrightness * 0.25f;
4621 }
4622
4623 if (difficulty < Difficulty::NORMAL)
4624 {
4625 result *= difficulty / 2.0f;
4626 }
4627
4628 return Mth::clamp(result, 0.0f, isHard ? 1.5f : 1.0f);;
4629}

4631bool Level::useNewSeaLevel()
4632{
4633 return levelData->useNewSeaLevel();
4634}

4651int Level::getOriginalSaveVersion()
4652{

4655
4656// 4J - determine if a chunk has been done the post-post-processing stage. This happens when *its* neighbours have each been post-processed, and does some final lighting that can
4657// only really be done when the post-processing has placed all possible tiles into this chunk.
4658bool Level::isChunkPostPostProcessed(int x, int z)
4659{
4660 if( !hasChunk(x, z) ) return false; // This will occur for non-loaded chunks, not for edge chunks
4661
4662 LevelChunk *lc = getChunk(x, z);
4663 if( lc->isEmpty() ) return true; // Since we've already eliminated non-loaded chunks, this should only occur for edge chunks. Consider those as fully processed
4664
4665 return (( lc->terrainPopulated & LevelChunk::sTerrainPostPostProcessed ) == LevelChunk::sTerrainPostPostProcessed);
4666}
4667
4668// 4J added - returns true if a chunk is fully, fully finalised - in that it can be sent to another machine. This is the case when all 8 neighbours of this chunk
4669// have not only been post-processed, but also had the post-post-processing done that they themselves can only do once Their 8 neighbours have been post-processed.
4670bool Level::isChunkFinalised(int x, int z)
4671{
4672 for( int xo = -1; xo <= 1; xo++ )
4673 for( int zo = -1; zo <= 1; zo++ )
4674 {
4675 if( !isChunkPostPostProcessed(x + xo, z + zo) ) return false;
4676 }
4677
4678 return true;
4679}
4680
4681int Level::getUnsavedChunkCount()
4682{
4683 return m_unsavedChunkCount;
4684}
4685
4686void Level::incrementUnsavedChunkCount()
4687{
4688 ++m_unsavedChunkCount;
4689}
4690
4691void Level::decrementUnsavedChunkCount()
4692{
4693 --m_unsavedChunkCount;
4694}
4695
4696bool Level::canCreateMore(eINSTANCEOF type, ESPAWN_TYPE spawnType)
4697{
4698 int count = 0;
4699 int max = 0;
4700 if(spawnType == eSpawnType_Egg || spawnType == eSpawnType_Portal)
4701 {
4702 switch(type)
4703 {
4704 case eTYPE_VILLAGER:
4705 count = countInstanceOf( eTYPE_VILLAGER, true);
4706 max = MobCategory::MAX_XBOX_VILLAGERS_WITH_SPAWN_EGG;
4707 break;
4708 case eTYPE_CHICKEN:
4709 count = countInstanceOf( eTYPE_CHICKEN, true);
4710 max = MobCategory::MAX_XBOX_CHICKENS_WITH_SPAWN_EGG;
4711 break;
4712 case eTYPE_WOLF:
4713 count = countInstanceOf( eTYPE_WOLF, true);
4714 max = MobCategory::MAX_XBOX_WOLVES_WITH_SPAWN_EGG;
4715 break;
4716 case eTYPE_MUSHROOMCOW:
4717 count = countInstanceOf( eTYPE_MUSHROOMCOW, true);
4718 max = MobCategory::MAX_XBOX_MUSHROOMCOWS_WITH_SPAWN_EGG;
4719 break;
4720 case eTYPE_SQUID:
4721 count = countInstanceOf( eTYPE_SQUID, true);
4722 max = MobCategory::MAX_XBOX_SQUIDS_WITH_SPAWN_EGG;
4723 break;
4724 case eTYPE_SNOWMAN:
4725 count = countInstanceOf( eTYPE_SNOWMAN, true);
4726 max = MobCategory::MAX_XBOX_SNOWMEN;
4727 break;
4728 case eTYPE_VILLAGERGOLEM:
4729 count = countInstanceOf( eTYPE_VILLAGERGOLEM, true);
4730 max = MobCategory::MAX_XBOX_IRONGOLEM;
4731 break;
4732 case eTYPE_WITHERBOSS:
4733 count = countInstanceOf(eTYPE_WITHERBOSS, true) + countInstanceOf(eTYPE_ENDERDRAGON, true);
4734 max = MobCategory::MAX_CONSOLE_BOSS;
4735 break;
4736 default:
4737 if((type & eTYPE_ANIMALS_SPAWN_LIMIT_CHECK) == eTYPE_ANIMALS_SPAWN_LIMIT_CHECK)
4738 {
4739 count = countInstanceOf( eTYPE_ANIMALS_SPAWN_LIMIT_CHECK, false);
4740 max = MobCategory::MAX_XBOX_ANIMALS_WITH_SPAWN_EGG;
4741 }
4742 // 4J: Use eTYPE_ENEMY instead of monster (slimes and ghasts aren't monsters)
4743 else if(Entity::instanceof(type, eTYPE_ENEMY))
4744 {
4745 count = countInstanceOf(eTYPE_ENEMY, false);
4746 max = MobCategory::MAX_XBOX_MONSTERS_WITH_SPAWN_EGG;
4747 }
4748 else if( (type & eTYPE_AMBIENT) == eTYPE_AMBIENT)
4749 {
4750 count = countInstanceOf( eTYPE_AMBIENT, false);
4751 max = MobCategory::MAX_AMBIENT_WITH_SPAWN_EGG;
4752 }
4753 // 4J: Added minecart and boats
4754 else if (Entity::instanceof(type, eTYPE_MINECART))
4755 {
4756 count = countInstanceOf(eTYPE_MINECART, false);
4757 max = Level::MAX_CONSOLE_MINECARTS;
4758 }
4759 else if (Entity::instanceof(type, eTYPE_BOAT))
4760 {
4761 count = countInstanceOf(eTYPE_BOAT, true);
4762 max = Level::MAX_XBOX_BOATS;
4763 }
4764 };
4765 }
4766 else if(spawnType == eSpawnType_Breed)
4767 {
4768 switch(type)
4769 {
4770 case eTYPE_VILLAGER:
4771 count = countInstanceOf( eTYPE_VILLAGER, true);
4772 max = MobCategory::MAX_VILLAGERS_WITH_BREEDING;
4773 break;
4774 case eTYPE_CHICKEN:
4775 count = countInstanceOf( eTYPE_CHICKEN, true);
4776 max = MobCategory::MAX_XBOX_CHICKENS_WITH_BREEDING;
4777 break;
4778 case eTYPE_WOLF:
4779 count = countInstanceOf( eTYPE_WOLF, true);
4780 max = MobCategory::MAX_XBOX_WOLVES_WITH_BREEDING;
4781 break;
4782 case eTYPE_MUSHROOMCOW:
4783 count = countInstanceOf( eTYPE_MUSHROOMCOW, true);
4784 max = MobCategory::MAX_XBOX_MUSHROOMCOWS_WITH_BREEDING;
4785 break;
4786 default:
4787 if((type & eTYPE_ANIMALS_SPAWN_LIMIT_CHECK) == eTYPE_ANIMALS_SPAWN_LIMIT_CHECK)
4788 {
4789 count = countInstanceOf( eTYPE_ANIMALS_SPAWN_LIMIT_CHECK, false);
4790 max = MobCategory::MAX_XBOX_ANIMALS_WITH_BREEDING;
4791 }
4792 else if( (type & eTYPE_MONSTER) == eTYPE_MONSTER)
4793 {
4794
4795 }
4796 break;
4797 }
4798 }
4799 // 4J: Interpret 0 as no limit
4800 return max == 0 || count < max;
4801}
